definitionZh: v  取消， 废除； 抵消， 对消； 删去， 划掉
definitionEn: to decide that something that was officially planned will not happen
example: Our flight was cancelled.

definitionZh: adj  爆炸的， 爆发的； 使人冲动的; n 爆炸物，炸药
definitionEn: able or likely to explode; a substance that can cause an explosion
example: Because the gas is highly explosive, it needs to be kept in high-pressure containers.

definitionZh: v  准备， 预备
definitionEn: to make plans or arrangements for something that will happen in the future
example: The prosecution wanted more time to prepare their case.

definitionZh: v  加入十字军， 投身正义运动; n 十字军；斗争，运动
definitionEn: to take part in a crusade; a determined attempt to change something because you think you are morally right

definitionZh: n  小村庄
definitionEn: a very small village

definitionZh: n  外科医生
definitionEn: a doctor who does operations in a hospital
example: ...a heart surgeon.

definitionZh: n  门厅； 礼堂
definitionEn: the area just inside the door of a house or other building, that leads to other rooms
example: a huge tiled entrance hall

definitionZh: vt  使泄气， 使灰心； 阻止， 劝阻
definitionEn: to make someone less confident or less willing to do something
example: You should not let one failure discourage you.

definitionZh: v  事先影响某人； 偏爱； 易受感染
example: They take pains to hire people whose personalities predispose them to serve customers well.

definitionZh: vt  监督， 监视； 俯瞰， 眺望
definitionEn: to be in charge of a group of workers and check that a piece of work is done satisfactorily
example: A team leader was appointed to oversee the project.

definitionZh: n  污染， 污染物； 玷污
definitionEn: the process of making air, water, soil etc dangerously dirty and not suitable for people to use, or the state of being dangerously dirty
example: California’s tough anti-pollution laws

definitionZh: v  装作， 假装
definitionEn: to behave as if something is true when in fact you know it is not, in order to deceive people or for fun
example: Let’s pretend we’re on the moon.

definitionZh: n  传送； 对流
definitionEn: the movement in a gas or liquid caused by warm gas or liquid rising, and cold gas or liquid sinking
example: ...clouds which lift warm, moist air by convection high into the atmosphere.

definitionZh: v 保证；
definitionEn: to promise that something is true
example: Therefore, it is important to note that individual situations may warrant including additional characters in the list of special characters.

definitionZh: n 【天】
definitionEn: the path along which the Sun seems to move
example: On the astrolabe, an off - centered circle represents the orbit of the sun - the ecliptic.

definitionZh: vt  隐藏； 隐瞒； 掩盖
definitionEn: to hide something carefully
example: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house.

definitionZh: vt  对…评价过高， 高估
definitionEn: If you say that something or someone is overrated, you mean that people have a higher opinion of them than they deserve
example: More men are finding out that the joys of work have been overrated.

definitionZh: adv  与此同时
definitionEn: while something else is happening
example: Cook the sauce over a medium heat until it thickens. Meanwhile start boiling the water for the pasta.

definitionZh: adj  豪华的， 华丽的， 富裕的； 丰富的， 丰饶的
definitionEn: very beautiful, with a lot of decoration, and made from expensive materials
example: evening dresses in opulent fabrics

definitionZh: vi  同时发生； 一致
definitionEn: to happen at the same time as something else, especially by chance
example: When our vacations coincided, we often holidayed together.

definitionZh: adj  有能力的； 能胜任的
definitionEn: having enough skill or knowledge to do something to a satisfactory standard
example: A competent mechanic should be able to fix the problem.

definitionZh: vt  需要； 命令； 规定， 要求
definitionEn: to need something
example: Campbell’s broken leg will probably require surgery.

definitionZh: n 划伤，
definitionEn: a small cut on someone’s skin
example: There were deep scratches all over her face.

definitionZh: adj  有同情心的， 表示怜悯的
definitionEn: feeling sympathy for people who are suffering
example: a caring, compassionate man

definitionZh: adj 合作的，协作的; n  合作社
definitionEn: willing to cooperate; a business or organization owned equally by all the people working there
example: He was doing his best to be cooperative.

definitionZh: n  战略家
definitionEn: someone who is good at planning things, especially military or political actions
example: Military strategists had devised a plan that guaranteed a series of stunning victories.

definitionZh: adj  急躁的， 易怒的， 易受刺激的； 过敏的
definitionEn: getting annoyed quickly or easily
example: Jo was tired, irritable, and depressed.

definitionZh: adj 三部分的；三倍的; v  增至三倍
definitionEn: having three parts or involving three groups, people, events etc; to increase by three times as much, or to make something do this
example: a triple murder investigation

definitionZh: adj  说话不多的， 内向的； 有所保留的， 预订的
definitionEn: A table in a restaurant or a seat in a theatre that is reserved is being kept for someone rather than given or sold to anyone else
example: Seats, or sometimes entire tables, were reserved.

definitionZh: n 情绪; vt  使缓和
definitionEn: the way you are feeling at a particular time, especially when you are feeling angry for a short time; to make something less severe or extreme
example: Pete hit his brother in a fit of temper .

definitionZh: v 发痒；使高兴，逗乐; n  痒
definitionEn: if something touching your body tickles you, it makes you want to rub your body because it is slightly uncomfortable; a feeling in your throat that makes you want to cough
example: Mommy, this blanket tickles.

definitionZh: v  反对， 不赞成; n 物体；对象；目标；宾语[əb'dʒekt]
definitionEn: to feel or say that you oppose or disapprove of something; a solid thing that you can hold, touch, or see but that is not alive
example: If no one objects, I would like Mrs Harrison to be present.

definitionZh: adj  能接近的； 易达到的
definitionEn: a place, building, or object that is accessible is easy to reach or get into
example: The island is only accessible by boat.

definitionZh: v  悬挂， 吊， 垂下； 吊死， 绞死
definitionEn: to kill someone by dropping them with a rope around their neck, or to die in this way, especially as a punishment for a serious crime
example: If he is found guilty, he will almost certainly hang.

definitionZh: vt  鉴别， 证明
definitionEn: to prove that something is true or real
example: The painting has been authenticated by experts.

definitionZh: v  满足， 满意； 足够
definitionEn: to be enough
example: A light lunch will suffice .

definitionZh: v  承认； 让步
definitionEn: to admit that something is true or correct, although you wish it were not true
example: ‘That’s the only possible solution.’ ‘Yes, I suppose so,’ Charles conceded.

definitionZh: adj 值得注意的；显著的，杰出的，显赫的; n  名人， 要人
definitionEn: important, interesting, excellent, or unusual enough to be noticed or mentioned
example: Every country in the world signed the treaty, with one notable exception - the United States.

definitionZh: adj  无双的， 无比的， 空前的
definitionEn: bigger, better, or worse than anything else
example: an achievement unparalleled in sporting history

definitionZh: adj 豪华的，舒适的; n  长毛绒
definitionEn: very comfortable, expensive, and of good quality; a silk or cotton material with a thick soft surface
example: a plush hotel

definitionZh: v  蒸发； 消失； 不复存在
definitionEn: if a liquid evaporates, or if heat evaporates it, it changes into a gas
example: Most of the water had evaporated.

definitionZh: n 委托；佣金; vt  授权， 委托
definitionEn: an extra amount of money that is paid to a person or organization according to the value of the goods they have sold or the services they have provided; to formally ask someone to write an official report, produce a work of art for you etc
example: The dealer takes a 20% commission on the sales he makes.

definitionZh: n  楼梯
definitionEn: a set of stairs inside a building with its supports and the side parts that you hold on to
example: They walked down the staircase together.

definitionZh: v  轻抛； 轻弹
definitionEn: to make a flat object such as a coin go upwards and turn over in the air
example: We flipped a coin to see who would go first.

definitionZh: v  连接， 衔接； 联合， 关联； 由…联想到； 给…接通电话
definitionEn: to join two or more things together
example: We’d like two rooms with connecting doors (= doors that join the rooms ) .

definitionZh: v  重新开始， 继续恢复
definitionEn: to start doing something again after stopping or being interrupted
example: She hopes to resume work after the baby is born.

definitionZh: vt 致函，写姓名地址；向…讲话，演说；处理，
definitionEn: if you address an envelope, package etc, you write on it the name and address of the person you are sending it to
example: Send a stamped, self-addressed envelope (=  with your address on it so it can be sent back to you  ) .

definitionZh: n  姿势； 心情； 态度
definitionEn: the way you position your body when sitting or standing
example: her upright posture

definitionZh: adj 螺旋形的，盘旋的; v 盘旋上升；急剧增长; n  螺旋形；逐渐加速上升
definitionEn: Spiral is also an adjective; to move in a continuous curve that gets nearer to or further from its central point as it goes round; A spiral is a shape which winds around and around, with each curve above or outside the previous one
example: ...a spiral staircase.

definitionZh: vt  斩首
definitionEn: to cut off someone’s head
example: a decapitated body

definitionZh: v 暂停；踌躇；
adj  过分的， 不合理的
definitionEn: an exorbitant price, amount of money etc is much higher than it should be
example: Exorbitant housing prices have created an acute shortage of affordable housing for the poor.

definitionZh: n  外科学； 外科手术； 手术室， 诊疗室
definitionEn: medical treatment in which a surgeon cuts open your body to repair or remove something inside
example: Dr. Hanson is in surgery.

definitionZh: adj  暴力的； 带有强烈感情的； 猛烈的
definitionEn: involving actions that are intended to injure or kill people, by hitting them, shooting them etc
example: the increase in violent crime

definitionZh: v 解决，解答；决定，决意；分解，分析; n  决心， 决意
definitionEn: to find a satisfactory way of dealing with a problem or difficulty; strong determination to succeed in doing something
example: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.

definitionZh: vt  遭遇； 面对， 正视
definitionEn: if a problem, difficulty etc confronts you, it appears and needs to be dealt with
example: The problems confronting the new government were enormous.

definitionZh: vt  部署； 使用， 运用
definitionEn: to organize or move soldiers, military equipment etc so that they are in the right place and ready to be used
example: a job in which a variety of professional skills will be deployed

definitionZh: v  繁殖， 生育； 复制， 仿造， 翻版； 再现， 使…在脑海中重现
definitionEn: if an animal or plant reproduces, or reproduces itself, it produces young plants or animals
example: The turtles return to the coast to reproduce.

definitionZh: vi 聚集在一起; n  杂乱的一堆； 拥挤
definitionEn: If people huddle in a group, they gather together to discuss something quietly or secretly; a group of people or things that are close together, but not arranged in any particular order, pattern, or system
example: Off to one side, Sticht, Macomber, Jordan, and Kreps huddled to discuss something.

definitionZh: n  表演， 扮演， 演唱； 翻译； 视觉再现
definitionEn: someone’s performance of a play, piece of music etc
example: He gave a moving rendition of Lennon’s ‘Imagine’.

definitionZh: n  道路交叉口， 十字路口
definitionEn: a place where roads, lines etc cross each other, especially where two roads meet
example: We crossed at a busy intersection.

definitionZh: n  奖学金； 学问， 学识
definitionEn: an amount of money that is given to someone by an educational organization to help pay for their education
example: Her latest publication is a fine piece of scholarship.

definitionZh: adv 除此之外，而且
definitionEn: used when adding another reason
example: I need the money. And besides, when I agree to do something, I do it.

definitionZh: vt  滴注； 逐渐灌输； 逐步培养
definitionEn: to teach someone to think, behave, or feel in a particular way over a period of time
example: The tough thing is trying to instil a winning attitude in the kids.

definitionZh: adj  易燃的； 易怒的
definitionEn: inflammable materials or substances will start to burn very easily
example: Petrol is highly inflammable.

definitionZh: vt 使生效，实施；贯彻，执行['ImplImənt]; n  工具
definitionEn: to take action or make changes that you have officially decided should happen; a tool, especially one used for outdoor physical work
example: The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions.

definitionZh: v 出口；输出，传播['3kspɔːt]; n  出口； 输出； 出口商品
definitionEn: to sell goods to another country; the business of selling and sending goods to other countries
example: Italian food has been exported all over the world.

definitionZh: n  安宁； 福利
vt  焚化， 焚毁， 把…烧成灰烬
definitionEn: to burn something completely in order to destroy it
example: All the infected clothing was incinerated.

definitionZh: n  想象
definitionEn: an exciting and unusual experience or situation you imagine happening to you, but which will probably never happen
example: I used to have fantasies about living in Paris with an artist.

definitionZh: v  侵蚀， 腐蚀； 削弱， 损害
definitionEn: if the weather erodes rock or soil, or if rock or soil erodes, its surface is gradually destroyed
example: The cliffs are being constantly eroded by heavy seas.

definitionZh: v 检查，核对；阻止，
definitionEn: to do something in order to find out whether something really is correct, true, or in good condition
example: Check the tiles carefully before you buy them.

definitionZh: vt  使沮丧； 挫败
definitionEn: if something frustrates you, it makes you feel annoyed or angry because you are unable to do what you want
example: The fact that he’s working with amateurs really frustrates him.

definitionZh: adj  华丽的； 极好的
definitionEn: extremely beautiful or attractive
example: ‘What do you think of my new flatmate?’ ‘He’s absolutely gorgeous !’

definitionZh: adj  务实的； 实事求是的； 实用主义观点的
definitionEn: dealing with problems in a sensible practical way instead of strictly following a set of ideas
example: Williams took a more pragmatic approach to management problems.

definitionZh: n  甲烷， 沼气
definitionEn: a gas that you cannot see or smell, which can be burned to give heat
example: Methane is one of the principal gases contributing to the greenhouse effect.

definitionZh: n  腐蚀； 磨损
definitionEn: the process by which rock or soil is gradually destroyed by wind, rain, or the sea
example: the problem of soil erosion

definitionZh: v  攀登； 上升， 升高
definitionEn: to move up through the air
example: The plane ascended rapidly.

definitionZh: adj  迷信的； 根据迷信的， 由迷信引起的； 受迷信思想支配的
definitionEn: influenced by superstitions
example: a superstitious woman

definitionZh: vt  重新定方位； 重新定位； 使适应
conj  倘若， 只要， 假如
definitionEn: used to say that something will only be possible if something else happens or is done
example: He can come with us, provided he pays for his own meals.

definitionZh: adj  必不可少的， 必需的
definitionEn: someone or something that is indispensable is so important or useful that it is impossible to manage without them
example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.

definitionZh: n  透镜； 镜片； 镜头
definitionEn: the part of a camera through which the light travels before it reaches the film
example: a standard 50mm lens

definitionZh: vt  表达， 体现； 具体表现， 使具体化； 包括， 包含
definitionEn: to be a very good example of an idea or quality
example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.

definitionZh: vt  使适应， 使熟悉情况； 给…定位， 给…定向； 使朝向； 转至特定方向； 适应
adj  细菌的； 由细菌引起的
definitionEn: Bacterial is used to describe things that relate to or are caused by bacteria
example: Cholera is a bacterial infection.

definitionZh: n  动机， 目的
definitionEn: the reason that makes someone do something, especially when this reason is kept hidden
example: What do you suppose the killer’s motive was?

definitionZh: vt  展望， 想象； 面对
definitionEn: to think that something is likely to happen in the future
example: The scheme cost a lot more than we had originally envisaged.

definitionZh: n  预料
definitionEn: when you are expecting something to happen
example: She waited in eager anticipation for Robert to arrive.

definitionZh: vt  使有动机； 激励， 激发
definitionEn: to make someone want to achieve something and make them willing to work hard in order to do this
example: A good teacher has to be able to motivate her students.

definitionZh: n  增援， 加强， 加固
definitionEn: the act of making something stronger
example: The bridge needs some structural reinforcement.

definitionZh: n 大学导师的辅导课；
definitionEn: a period of teaching and discussion with a tutor, especially in a British university
example: the tutorial system

definitionZh: v 损坏，破坏，糟蹋；宠坏，溺爱；变质
definitionEn: to have a bad effect on something so that it is no longer attractive, enjoyable, useful etc
example: The whole park is spoiled by litter.

definitionZh: v  增加， 繁殖； 乘
definitionEn: to breed
example: Bacteria multiply quickly in warm food.

definitionZh: n 牧场，草原; vt  放牧
definitionEn: land or a field that is covered with grass and is used for cattle, sheep etc to feed on; to put animals outside in a field to feed on the grass
example: large areas of rough upland pasture

definitionZh: n  虚弱， 衰弱
definitionEn: bad health or a particular illness
example: Health is a state of complete physical, mental and social well-being and not merely the absence of disease or infirmity.

definitionZh: n 飞行员，引航员; vt  驾驶， 为…引航
definitionEn: someone who operates the controls of an aircraft or spacecraft; to guide an aircraft, spacecraft, or ship as its pilot
example: an airline pilot

definitionZh: n  赞成， 同意； 正式批准
definitionEn: when a plan, decision, or person is officially accepted
example: The president has already given his approval to the plan.

definitionZh: adj  有疗效的； 医疗的
definitionEn: able to or intended to cure illness
example: the spring’s alleged curative properties

definitionZh: adj 多重的；多样的; n  倍数
definitionEn: many, or involving many things, people, events etc; a number that contains a smaller number an exact number of times
example: Baxter was rushed to the hospital with multiple stab wounds.

definitionZh: n  微生物学
definitionEn: the scientific study of very small living things such as  bacteria
example: ...a professor of microbiology and immunology.

definitionZh: n  磁铁， 磁石； 磁体； 有吸引力的人或物
definitionEn: a piece of iron or steel that can stick to metal or make other metal objects move towards itself
example: Prospect Park, with its vast lake, is a magnet for all health freaks.

definitionZh: vt  使暴露， 揭露
definitionEn: to show something that is usually covered or hidden
example: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.

definitionZh: adj  多才多艺的， 多面手的； 多用途的， 通用的
definitionEn: someone who is versatile has many different skills
example: a very versatile performer

definitionZh: v 全神贯注，全力以赴；集中，聚集；浓缩; n  浓缩物， 浓缩液
definitionEn: to be present in large numbers or amounts somewhere, or to cause people or things to be present in large numbers or amounts somewhere; a substance or liquid which has been made stronger by removing most of the water from it
example: Construction of the aircraft is being concentrated at Prestwick.

definitionZh: prep  与…相对， 对抗
definitionEn: used to show that two people or teams are competing against each other in a game or court case
example: the New York Knicks versus the LA Lakers

definitionZh: vt  居住于， 生活于
definitionEn: if an area is populated by a particular group of people, they live there
example: The highlands are populated mainly by peasant farmers.

definitionZh: adj  直到最近的； 现代的
definitionEn: If something is up-to-date, it is the newest thing of its kind
example: ...the most up-to-date information available on foods today.

definitionZh: adj  适当的， 相配的； 合适的， 适宜的
definitionEn: having the right qualities for a particular person, purpose, or situation
example: We are hoping to find a suitable school.

definitionZh: n  全体人员， 员工
definitionEn: the people who work in a company, organization, or military force
example: All personnel are to receive security badges.

definitionZh: v  溅； 泼
definitionEn: if a liquid splashes, it hits or falls on something and makes a noise
example: The children were splashing about in the pool.

definitionZh: n  观点， 见解； 展望， 前景
definitionEn: what is expected to happen in the future
example: Exercise will improve your looks and your outlook.

definitionZh: n  恋爱； 浪漫爱情； 爱情小说， 传奇故事
definitionEn: love, or a feeling of being in love
example: The romance had gone out of their relationship.

definitionZh: n  喷泉
definitionEn: a structure from which water is pushed up into the air, used for example as decoration in a garden or park
example: ...the fountains on the 16th Street Mall.

definitionZh: adj  不相关的； 离题的
definitionEn: not useful or not relating to a particular situation, and therefore not important
example: We’re focussing too much on irrelevant details.

definitionZh: n  小巧的器械， 精巧的装置； 小玩意
definitionEn: a small, useful, and cleverly-designed machine or tool
example: a neat gadget for sharpening knives

definitionZh: n  同胞； 同国人
definitionEn: someone who was born in or is a citizen of the same country as someone else
example: Chris Robertson of Australia beat his compatriot Chris Dittmar in the final.

definitionZh: n  含意； 暗示， 暗指； 卷入， 牵连
definitionEn: a situation in which it is shown or suggested that someone or something is involved in a crime or a dishonest act
example: They are called ‘Supertrams’, the implication being that (= which is meant to suggest that ) they are more advanced than earlier models.

definitionZh: adj  凶猛的； 强烈的
definitionEn: done with a lot of energy and strong feelings, and sometimes violence
example: fierce fighting in the city

definitionZh: n  保留意见， 存疑； 预定， 预订
definitionEn: an arrangement which you make so that a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc is kept for you at a particular time in the future
example: a dinner reservation

definitionZh: n 一排房屋，街区；阻塞；大块木料; vt  阻塞， 拦阻； 封锁
definitionEn: a piece of hard material such as wood or stone with straight sides; to prevent anything moving through a space by being or placing something across it or in it
example: a wall made of concrete blocks

definitionZh: n  灭火器； 灭火者
definitionEn: a fire extinguisher
example: Check the expiry date for all foam extinguisher.

definitionZh: n  合作， 协作； 配合
definitionEn: when you work with someone to achieve something that you both want
example: the need to strengthen international co-operation

definitionZh: adj  胆小的； 羞怯的
definitionEn: not having courage or confidence
example: I was a timid child.

definitionZh: v  提议， 建议； 提名， 推荐； 打算； 求婚
definitionEn: to suggest something as a plan or course of action
example: the changes currently proposed by the local planning authorities

definitionZh: adj  休耕的； 休闲的
definitionEn: fallow land is dug or  ploughed  but is not used for growing crops
example: They let the land lie fallow for a year.

definitionZh: adj  可更新的， 可再生的， 可恢复的； 可延长有效期的， 可续期的
definitionEn: if an agreement or official document is renewable, you can make it continue for a further period of time after it ends
example: It’s a six-month lease but it’s renewable.

definitionZh: adj  有恶意的； 恶毒的
definitionEn: a malevolent person wants to harm other people
example: Her stare was malevolent, her mouth a thin line.

definitionZh: vi  继而发生； 接着发生
definitionEn: to happen after or as a result of something
example: If the Europeans did not reduce subsidies, a trade war would ensue.

definitionZh: adj  可预知的， 能预测的
definitionEn: foreseeable difficulties, events etc should be planned for because they are very likely to happen in the future
example: The judge found that it was not foreseeable that the fuel would catch fire.

definitionZh: n 教练；指导；长途汽车; vt  训练； 辅导
definitionEn: someone who trains a person or team in a sport; to teach a person or team the skills they need for a sport
example: a tennis coach

definitionZh: v 难过，
definitionEn: to become sad and not continue your life as normal because someone has died or gone away
example: Six months after he left, she was still pining.

definitionZh: n  行李式传送带
definitionEn: the moving belt that you collect your bags from at an airport

definitionZh: n  反话， 讽刺； 出人意料的事情
definitionEn: a situation that is unusual or amusing because something strange happens, or the opposite of what is expected happens or is true
example: Life is full of little ironies.

definitionZh: n 碎屑; vt  废弃； 抛弃
definitionEn: a small piece of paper, cloth etc; to decide not to use a plan or system because it is not practical
example: a rug made out of old scraps of material

definitionZh: n  连接； 连词
definitionEn: a word such as ‘and’, ‘but’, or ‘because’ which joins parts of a sentence

definitionZh: adj  院的
definitionEn: of or relating to a judicial or legislative chamber

definitionZh: n  草地
definitionEn: a field with wild grass and flowers
example: Lambs gamboled in the meadow.

definitionZh: adj 烤过的; v  烤， 炙; n 烤肉
definitionEn: roasted; to cook something, such as meat, in an  oven  or over a fire, or to cook in this way; a large piece of roasted meat
example: roast chicken

definitionZh: n  连续； 接替， 继承
definitionEn: happening one after the other without anything diffe-rent happening in between
example: She won the championship four times in succession.

definitionZh: vt  用力拖； 搬运
definitionEn: to pull something heavy with a continuous steady movement
example: the steam locomotive which hauled the train

definitionZh: adj  有力的， 精力旺盛的； 积极的
definitionEn: having or needing a lot of energy or determination
example: an energetic man

definitionZh: vt 有帮助，有益，
n  消耗量； 损耗； 减员
definitionEn: when something is lost or destroyed, especially in a way that is not useful or reasonable, or the amount that is lost or destroyed
example: The system used to result in a great deal of food wastage.

definitionZh: vt  使贫困； 使枯竭， 使贫瘠
definitionEn: to make someone very poor
example: Falling coffee prices have impoverished many developing economies.

definitionZh: n  质量， 才干， 能力； 口径
definitionEn: the level of quality or ability that someone or something has achieved
example: The school attracts a high calibre of student.

definitionZh: adj  首要的， 第一位的； 最著名的; n 总理；首相
definitionEn: best or most important; a  prime minister  – used in news reports
example: one of Dublin’s premier hotels

definitionZh: adj  受崇敬的； 神圣的
definitionEn: holy or made holy by religious practices
example: The bones will be buried in hallowed ground.

definitionZh: adj  智力的； 理智的; n 知识分子
definitionEn: relating to the ability to understand things and think intelligently; an intelligent, well-educated person who spends time thinking about complicated ideas and discussing them
example: Mark’s very intellectual.

definitionZh: vt  纠正； 要求归还， 收回； 开垦
definitionEn: to get back an amount of money that you have paid
example: You may be entitled to reclaim some tax.

definitionZh: n  过敏的， 变态反应的， 变应性的
v 欺骗；作弊; n  欺骗； 骗子
definitionEn: to behave in a dishonest way in order to win or to get an advantage, especially in a competition, game, or examination; someone who is dishonest and cheats
example: He had cheated in the test by using a calculator.

definitionZh: vt  使丧失能力， 使伤残； 使不能正常运转， 使无效
definitionEn: to make someone unable to use a part of their body properly
example: Carter was permanently disabled in the war.

definitionZh: adv  毋庸置疑地， 确凿地
vt  使恐惧， 使惊骇； 使震惊； 使感到厌恶
definitionEn: to make someone feel very shocked and upset or afraid
example: Henry was horrified by what had happened.

definitionZh: n  短故事； 趣闻， 轶事
definitionEn: a short story based on your personal experience
example: The book is full of amusing anecdotes about his life in Japan.

definitionZh: n  奢侈， 挥霍； 放肆的言行
definitionEn: Extravagance is the spending of more money than is reasonable or than you can afford
example: When the company went under, tales of his extravagance surged through the industry.

definitionZh: v  悄悄进入， 潜入； 渗入， 渗透
definitionEn: to secretly join an organization or enter a place in order to find out information about it or harm it
example: Police attempts to infiltrate neo-Nazi groups were largely unsuccessful.

definitionZh: adj  敌方的； 不友善的； 不利的
definitionEn: angry and deliberately unfriendly towards someone, and ready to argue with them
example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .

definitionZh: v  给…加燃料; n 燃料
definitionEn: if you fuel a vehicle, or if it fuels up, fuel is put into it; a substance such as coal, gas, or oil that can be burned to produce heat or energy
example: We’d better fuel up at the next town.

definitionZh: n  一切植物， 植物群
definitionEn: all the plants that grow in a particular place or country
example: Tourism is damaging the flora and fauna (= plants and animals ) of the island.

definitionZh: adj  天体的， 天上的
definitionEn: relating to the sky or heaven
example: ...the clusters of celestial bodies in the ever-expanding universe.

definitionZh: vi 爬，爬行；缓慢行进; n  缓慢的行进； 自由泳
definitionEn: to move along on your hands and knees with your body close to the ground; a very slow speed
example: We crawled into bed at 2 am.

definitionZh: adj  完全相同的， 同一的
definitionEn: exactly the same, or very similar
example: four identical houses

definitionZh: v 走得慢；落后; n  间隔； 滞后
definitionEn: to move or develop more slowly than others; a delay or period of waiting between one event and a second event
example: Western banks still lag behind financial institutions in most other regions of the country.

definitionZh: adj  有抱负的， 有雄心的， 有野心的
definitionEn: determined to be successful, rich, powerful etc
example: Alfred was intensely ambitious, obsessed with the idea of becoming rich.

definitionZh: adj 学院的；学术的；不切实际的; n  学者； 大学教师
definitionEn: relating to education, especially at college or university level; a teacher in a college or university
example: He possessed no academic qualifications.

definitionZh: adj  珊瑚色的， 红色的; n 珊瑚；珊瑚虫
definitionEn: pink or reddish-orange in colour; a hard red, white, or pink substance formed from the bones of very small sea creatures, which is often used to make jewellery
example: It is like the bow of the King of the Persians that is painted with vermilion and is tipped with coral.

definitionZh: vi 运行，起作用; n  功能； 职责， 作用； 函数
definitionEn: to work in the correct or intended way; the purpose that something has, or the job that someone or something does
example: Her legs have now ceased to function .

definitionZh: n  失职； 行为不良
definitionEn: illegal or immoral behaviour or actions, especially by young people
example: the ever-rising statistics of delinquency and crime

definitionZh: adj  典型的， 有代表性的; n 代表，代理人
definitionEn: typical of a particular group or thing; someone who has been chosen to speak, vote, or make decisions for someone else
example: The pollsters asked a representative sample of New York residents for their opinions.

definitionZh: n  经度， 经线
definitionEn: the distance east or west of a particular  meridian (= imaginary line along the Earth’s surface from the North Pole to the South Pole )  , measured in degrees
example: The town lies at longitude 12˚ east.

definitionZh: adj  懒散的； 松弛的， 不严格的， 马虎的
definitionEn: not strict or careful enough about standards of behaviour, work, safety etc
example: One of the problem areas is lax security for airport personnel.

definitionZh: n  比较， 对比， 对照； 比喻， 比拟
definitionEn: the process of comparing two or more people or things
example: Her paintings invite comparison with those of the early Impressionists (= they remind you of them ) .

definitionZh: v 孵出，孵化；策划; n  开口； 舱门
definitionEn: if an egg hatches, or if it is hatched, it breaks, letting the young bird, insect etc come out; a hole in a ship or aircraft, usually used for loading goods, or the door that covers it
example: The eggs take three days to hatch.

definitionZh: interjection 请重复一遍，请再说一遍〔没听清对方的话希望重复一遍时的用语〕; v 赦免; n 赦免令，赦免状
definitionEn: used when you want someone to repeat something because you did not hear it; to officially allow someone who has been found guilty of a crime to go free without being punished; Pardon is also a noun
example: ‘Hurry up Jonathan!’ ‘Pardon?’ ‘I said hurry up!’

definitionZh: n  食草动物
definitionEn: an animal that only eats plants
example: Most herbivore teeth are grinders, canines are usually absent.

definitionZh: n  冒险， 冒险活动； 异乎寻常的经历， 奇遇
definitionEn: an exciting experience in which dangerous or unusual things happen
example: a great adventure

definitionZh: adj  连续的
definitionEn: coming or following one after the other
example: The team has had five successive victories.

definitionZh: n 状况，状态；; vt  训练； 使适应， 使习惯于； 对…有重要影响
definitionEn: the state that something is in, especially how good or bad its physical state is; to make a person or an animal think or behave in a certain way by influencing or training them over a period of time
example: Profits increased by £1.5m, despite the difficult economic conditions.

definitionZh: adj  口渴的； 饥渴的
definitionEn: feeling that you want or need a drink
example: Can I have a glass of water? I’m really thirsty.

definitionZh: n  典礼； 仪式
definitionEn: an important social or religious event, when a traditional set of actions is performed in a formal way
example: a wedding ceremony

definitionZh: v  改善， 改进
definitionEn: to make something better, or to become better
example: a course for students wishing to improve their English

definitionZh: n  义务， 职责， 责任
definitionEn: a moral or legal duty to do something
example: Employers have an obligation to treat all employees equally.

definitionZh: n  鹰， 隼
definitionEn: a large bird that hunts and eats small birds and animals
example: She watched his every move like a hawk.

definitionZh: n  稀有； 稀有的事物
definitionEn: something that is valuable or interesting because it is rare
example: Some of these plants are national rarities.

definitionZh: adj  爱国的， 有爱国心的； 显示出爱国精神的
definitionEn: having or expressing a great love of your country
example: patriotic songs

definitionZh: n  盥洗室， 厕所
definitionEn: a toilet or the room a toilet is in
example: ...the ladies' lavatory.

definitionZh: adj 外部的，外表的; n  外部， 外表
definitionEn: on the outside of something; the outside of something, especially a building
example: The exterior walls need a new coat of paint.

definitionZh: vt&n  指责， 谴责， 责难
definitionEn: If you censure someone for something that they have done, you tell them that you strongly disapprove of it
example: The ethics committee may take a decision to admonish him or to censure him.

definitionZh: adj  密闭的； 无懈可击的
definitionEn: not allowing air to get in or out
example: airtight containers

definitionZh: n  技巧， 技艺； 技术， 技能
definitionEn: a special way of doing something
example: He’s a great player, with brilliant technique.

definitionZh: n  速记法； 速记
definitionEn: a fast method of writing using special signs or shorter forms to represent letters, words, and phrases
example: a secretary who takes shorthand (= writes in shorthand )

definitionZh: n  囚禁， 拘留
definitionEn: when a person or animal is kept in a prison,  cage  etc and not allowed to go where they want
example: The hostages were released from captivity.

definitionZh: n  舞台布景； 风景， 景色
definitionEn: the natural features of a particular part of a country that you can see, such as mountains, forests, deserts etc
example: The best part of the trip was the fantastic scenery.

definitionZh: adj  有效的， 生效的； 给人深刻印象的， 显著的
definitionEn: successful, and working in the way that was intended
example: The cheaper drugs are just as effective in treating arthritis.

definitionZh: vt  粗暴地对待； 错误地处理， 胡乱操作
definitionEn: to deal with a situation badly, because of a lack of skill or care
example: The prime minister admitted that the crisis had been mishandled.

definitionZh: adv  同样地， 类似地
definitionEn: in a similar way
example: The first letter she wrote me was less than a page long, and her second letter was similarly brief.

definitionZh: n  肌肉； 体力； 力量， 实力
definitionEn: one of the pieces of flesh inside your body that you use in order to move, and that connect your bones together
example: Relax your stomach muscles , then stretch again.

definitionZh: adj  慷慨的； 大量的
definitionEn: someone who is generous is willing to give money, spend time etc, in order to help people or give them pleasure
example: a generous glass of wine

definitionZh: adj  不利的， 有害的
definitionEn: causing harm or damage
example: the detrimental effect of pollution on the environment

definitionZh: n 方向；趋势，动向；
definitionEn: the way something or someone moves, faces, or is aimed
example: Which direction did they go in ?

definitionZh: n  展览； 陈列
definitionEn: a show of paintings, photographs, or other objects that people can go to see
example: ...an exhibition of expressionist art.

definitionZh: adv  两倍地， 双重地; adj 两倍的，双重的；两部分的
definitionEn: two times as much or as many of something
example: a twofold increase in cases of TB

definitionZh: n  学士； 单身汉
definitionEn: a man who has never been married
example: Gerald was 38, and a confirmed bachelor (=  a man who has decided that he will never marry  ) .

definitionZh: v 探索，查究；探查，探测; n  探针； 探测器， 探测飞船； 探索， 调查
definitionEn: to ask questions in order to find things out, especially things that other people do not want you to know; a long thin metal instrument that doctors and scientists use to examine parts of the body
example: Police probed claims that he had sold drugs.

definitionZh: v  使充气， 使膨胀； 使得意， 使骄傲； 抬高， 使膨胀
definitionEn: to fill something with air or gas so it becomes larger, or to become filled with air or gas
example: It took us half an hour to inflate the dinghy.

definitionZh: adj 稳定的，稳固的，安定的；沉稳的，持重的; n  马厩
definitionEn: steady and not likely to move or change; a building where horses are kept
example: A wide base will make the structure much more stable.

definitionZh: vt 控制，利用；上马具; n  马具
definitionEn: to control and use the natural force or power of something; a set of leather bands used to control a horse or to attach it to a vehicle it is pulling
example: We can harness the power of the wind to generate electricity.

definitionZh: vi  回答， 答复； 响应； 作出反应
definitionEn: to do something as a reaction to something that has been said or done
example: They are likely to respond positively to the president's request for aid.

definitionZh: v 画素描；概述; n  素描； 速写
definitionEn: to draw a sketch of something; a simple, quickly made drawing that does not show much detail
example: Holford sketched a 10-year programme for rebuilding the city.

definitionZh: n  发生的事； 事件， 事变
definitionEn: an event, especially one that is unusual, important, or violent
example: Am I at risk because of some incident in my sexual past?

definitionZh: n  维持； 保养； 抚养费
definitionEn: the repairs, painting etc that are necessary to keep something in good condition
example: the cost of repairs and maintenance

definitionZh: v  成群； 群集; n 串，束，群
definitionEn: If people cluster together, they gather together in a small group; a group of things of the same kind that are very close together
example: The passengers clustered together in small groups.

definitionZh: vi  捕食； 折磨， 使烦恼； 掠夺; n 猎物，捕获物；牺牲品，战利品
definitionEn: A creature that preys on other creatures lives by catching and eating them; an animal, bird etc that is hunted and eaten by another animal
example: The effect was to disrupt the food chain, starving many animals and those that preyed on them.

definitionZh: v  用力拖
n  远征， 探险， 考察； 旅行， 出行； 远征队， 探险队， 考察队
definitionEn: a long and carefully organized journey, especially to a dangerous or unfamiliar place, or the people that make this journey
example: an expedition to the North Pole

definitionZh: adj  有脊椎的; n 脊椎动物
definitionEn: a living creature that has a backbone
example: Dead bodies of vertebrate in the field should not be collected or closely examined.

definitionZh: n  音乐会， 演奏会
definitionEn: a performance given by musicians or singers
example: a rock concert

definitionZh: adj  漠不关心的； 不烦恼的
definitionEn: not worried about something because you think it does not affect you
example: Paul was unconcerned about what he had done.

definitionZh: v  吸收； 吸引…的注意， 使全神贯注； 把…并入， 同化
definitionEn: to take in liquid, gas, or another substance from the surface or space around something
example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.

definitionZh: n 供给，供应；; vt  供给， 供应； 满足， 弥补
definitionEn: an amount of something that is available to be used; to provide people with something that they need or want, especially regularly over a long period of time
example: The nation’s fuel supplies will not last forever.

definitionZh: vt 涉及；使关心；
definitionEn: If you concern yourself with something, you give it attention because you think that it is important
example: I didn't concern myself with politics.

definitionZh: n  底土， 下层土
definitionEn: the layer of soil between the ground’s surface and the lower layer of hard rock
example: ...the chalk subsoil on the site.

definitionZh: v 抑制，克制; n  反复句， 叠句； 副歌； 经常重复的评价
definitionEn: to not do something that you want to do; part of a song or poem that is repeated, especially at the end of each  verse
example: Mrs. Hardie refrained from making any comment.

definitionZh: v  结合
definitionEn: to combine, or to join things together to form one thing
example: The company plans to merge its subsidiaries in the US.

definitionZh: n 码头；船坞; v （使）〔船〕进港，（使）停靠码头
definitionEn: a place in a port where ships are loaded, unloaded, or repaired; if a ship docks, or if the captain docks it, it sails into a dock so that it can unload
example: A crowd was waiting at the dock to greet them.

definitionZh: n 混杂，掺杂；
definitionEn: a lot of different things mixed together in an untidy way, without any order
example: This might be compared with the jumble of wavelengths of sound that go to make up ordinary noise.

definitionZh: n  要素； 元素； [the -s] 基本原理
definitionEn: one part or feature of a whole system, plan, piece of work etc, especially one that is basic or important
example: Business and management elements are built into the course.

definitionZh: n  财富， 富裕； 丰富， 富饶
adj  很可能的， 大概的
definitionEn: likely to exist, happen, or be true
example: The probable cause of the fire was faulty wiring.

definitionZh: n  对立面， 对立物
definitionEn: a person or thing that is as different as possible from someone or something else
example: She’s quite shy, the exact opposite of Becky.

definitionZh: n  营养障碍； 营养不良
example: In fleck corneal dystrophy, the lesion only involved stroma, epithelium and endothelium levels were normal.

definitionZh: v 打包，收拾；包装，包裹；塞满; n  包
definitionEn: to put things into cases, bags etc ready for a trip somewhere; something wrapped in paper or packed in a box and then sent by post or taken somewhere
example: I forgot to pack my razor.

definitionZh: n  污染物质， 有害物质
definitionEn: a substance that makes air, water, soil etc dangerously dirty, and is caused by cars, factories etc
example: a dumping ground for toxic pollutants

definitionZh: n  暗示， 提示
definitionEn: an action or event that is a signal for something else to happen
example: She stood nervously in the wings waiting for her cue.

definitionZh: v  入学； 登记； 加入； 招收
v  侵犯， 侵害； 违背， 触犯； 干涉， 干扰
definitionEn: If someone infringes a law or a rule, they break it or do something that disobeys it
example: The film exploited his image and infringed his copyright.

definitionZh: v  稳定， 稳固
example: However, after three weeks of cold exposure, body weight began to stabilise.

definitionZh: n  招待， 款待； 娱乐； 供消遣的事物
definitionEn: when you entertain someone at home, or for business
example: the entertainment of friends

definitionZh: n 公文，文件，证件; vt  用文件证明； 记载
definitionEn: a piece of paper that has official information on it; to write about something, film it, or take photographs of it, in order to record information about it
example: She produces legal documents for a downtown Seattle law firm.

definitionZh: n  可利用性， 可得性； 利用的可能性； 可利用的人或物
n  电池， 蓄电池
definitionEn: an object that provides a supply of electricity for something such as a radio, car, or toy
example: You have to take the top off to change the batteries .

definitionZh: v  挨饿； 饿死
definitionEn: to suffer or die because you do not have enough to eat
example: Thousands of people will starve if food doesn’t reach the city.

definitionZh: n  泥土， 黏土
definitionEn: a type of heavy sticky earth that can be used for making pots, bricks etc
example: ...the heavy clay soils of Georgia.

definitionZh: vt  促进； 提升； 促销
definitionEn: If people promote something, they help or encourage it to happen, increase, or spread
example: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.

definitionZh: n&v  进攻； 抨击； 突然发作
definitionEn: an act of violence that is intended to hurt a person or damage a place
example: a bomb attack

definitionZh: n  幽默， 幽默感
definitionEn: the ability or tendency to think that things are funny, or funny things you say that show you have this ability
example: his humour and charm

definitionZh: vt  分发， 分配， 分送； 散布， 分布； 分类， 分区
definitionEn: to share things among a group of people, especially in a planned way
example: a man distributing leaflets to passers-by

definitionZh: v  系， 贴； 认为有重要性； 使附属， 附加
definitionEn: to allow something to happen, but only if someone agrees to do a particular thing or accept a particular idea
example: When approving a merger, the commission can attach conditions.

definitionZh: adj  文字的； 生动的， 形象的； 绘画的， 图表的
definitionEn: Graphic means concerned with drawing or pictures, especially in publishing, industry, or computing
example: ...fine and graphic arts.

definitionZh: n  创造； 作品
definitionEn: the act of creating something
example: a job creation scheme

definitionZh: n  法律， 法规； 立法
definitionEn: a law or set of laws
example: This is a very important piece of legislation (= law ).

definitionZh: n  爱好； 趋势； 倾斜
definitionEn: a tendency to think or behave in a particular way
example: My natural inclination was to say no.

definitionZh: adj  充满…的； 担心的， 烦恼的
definitionEn: If a situation or action is fraught with problems or risks, it is filled with them
example: The earliest operations employing this technique were fraught with dangers.

definitionZh: n  组成部分， 成分； 原料； 要素， 因素
definitionEn: one of the foods that you use to make a particular food or dish
example: Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.

definitionZh: vi  参加， 参与
definitionEn: to take part in an activity or event
example: Some members refused to participate.

definitionZh: adj  有立体视觉的； 有立体效果的; v  刺， 戳； 黏贴， 黏住； 卡住， 陷住
definitionEn: a stereoscopic picture, photograph etc appears solid when you look at it through a special machine
example: {"COLLOINEXA":["stereoscopic vision"]}

definitionZh: adj  节约的； 经济的
definitionEn: using money, time, goods etc carefully and without wasting any
example: A small car is more economical to run.

definitionZh: v 磨光，擦亮；使优美，
definitionEn: to make something smooth, bright, and shiny by rubbing it
example: I spent all afternoon polishing the silver.

definitionZh: adj  视力的； 光学的
definitionEn: relating to machines or processes which are concerned with light, images, or the way we see things
example: microscopes and other optical instruments

definitionZh: n  方式； 流行款式； 时装
definitionEn: a style of clothes, hair etc that is popular at a particular time
example: Young people are very concerned with fashion

definitionZh: n  保险； 保险费； 保险业
definitionEn: an arrangement with a company in which you pay them money, especially regularly, and they pay the costs if something bad happens, for example if you become ill or your car is damaged
example: Your father took out insurance to cover the mortgage.

definitionZh: v 使目眩；
definitionEn: if a very bright light dazzles you, it stops you from seeing properly for a short time
example: a deer dazzled by the headlights

definitionZh: n  原则， 原理； 规范， 准则； 基本信念， 信条
definitionEn: a moral rule or belief about what is right and wrong, that influences how you behave
example: Schools try to teach children a set of principles.

definitionZh: vt 品尝，品味；欣赏；体会，体味; n  味道， 风味； 情趣， 吸引力
definitionEn: to fully enjoy the taste or smell of something; a pleasant taste or smell
example: She sipped her wine, savouring every drop.

definitionZh: vt  祝贺
definitionEn: to tell someone that you are happy because they have achieved something or because something nice has happened to them
example: He never even stopped to congratulate me.

definitionZh: adj  正式的； 正规的
definitionEn: made or done officially or publicly
example: formal recognition of the reformed church

definitionZh: adj  草绿色的； 似草的
definitionEn: covered with grass
example: a grassy bank

definitionZh: n  结合， 团结； 凝聚力
definitionEn: if there is cohesion among a group of people, a set of ideas etc, all the parts or members of it are connected or related in a reasonable way to form a whole
example: a sense of community and social cohesion

definitionZh: v  欢乐， 娱乐； 招待
definitionEn: If a performer, performance, or activity entertains you, it amuses you, interests you, or gives you pleasure
example: They were entertained by top singers, dancers and celebrities.

definitionZh: v  再生长， 再植
definitionEn: (of plants) to grow again and produce new tissue, esp to produce new growth on bare ground

definitionZh: adj  批评的， 评论的； 危急的， 紧要的； 临界的； 挑剔的
definitionEn: if you are critical, you criticize someone or something
example: He made some highly critical remarks.

definitionZh: adv  偶发地； 零星地
example: She gently dots it on to the face sporadically to mimic the pattern of real freckles.

definitionZh: adj 主要的; n  校长； 资本； 主角
definitionEn: most important; someone who is in charge of a school
example: His principal reason for making the journey was to visit his family.

definitionZh: vt  做， 犯
definitionEn: to do something that is morally wrong or illegal
example: Who could have perpetrated such a dreadful crime?

definitionZh: v  倾向于， 趋于； 照料； 招待
definitionEn: to look after someone or something
example: Sofia was in the bedroom tending to her son.

definitionZh: n  范例， 样品； 样本， 标本
definitionEn: a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
example: a blood specimen

definitionZh: adj  外来的； 奇异的； 醒目的， 吸引人的
definitionEn: Something that is exotic is unusual and interesting, usually because it comes from or is related to a distant country
example: ...brilliantly coloured, exotic flowers.

definitionZh: n  减轻， 解除； 援救， 救济； 安慰； 缓合剂
definitionEn: when something reduces someone’s pain or unhappy feelings
example: Marijuana can provide pain relief for some cancer patients.

definitionZh: n  介绍； 传入， 引进； 导言， 绪论
definitionEn: the act of formally telling two people each other’s names when they first meet
example: Pete, are you going to make the introductions?

definitionZh: adj 草本植物的；药草的; n  草本植物志； 药草书
definitionEn: Herbal means made from or using herbs
example: ...herbal remedies for colds.

definitionZh: vt  蒸馏， 提取
definitionEn: to make a liquid such as water or alcohol more pure by heating it so that it becomes a gas and then letting it cool. Drinks such as  whisky  are made this way.
example: distilled water

definitionZh: v  订阅， 订购； 申请， 预订
definitionEn: to pay money, usually once a year, to have copies of a newspaper or magazine sent to you, or to have some other service
example: My main reason for subscribing to New Scientist is to keep abreast of advances in science.

definitionZh: n  治疗， 疗法
definitionEn: the treatment of an illness or injury over a fairly long period of time
example: new drug therapies

definitionZh: n  集中； 专心， 专注； 浓缩， 浓度
definitionEn: the ability to think about something carefully or for a long time
example: She needed all her powers of concentration to stop herself from slipping on the icy road.

definitionZh: n  速度， 速率； 迅速， 快速
definitionEn: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction
example: the velocity of light

definitionZh: vi  同情， 怜悯
definitionEn: to express your sympathy for someone who is unhappy about something
example: When I lost, he commiserated with me.

definitionZh: vi  干涉， 干扰， 妨碍
definitionEn: to deliberately get involved in a situation where you are not wanted or needed
example: My daughter-in-law said that I was interfering, but I was only trying to help.

definitionZh: vt  装入胶囊； 压缩； 总结， 概述
definitionEn: to express or show something in a short way
example: The words of the song neatly encapsulate the mood of the country at that time.

definitionZh: adj  适合的; n 试穿；装置
definitionEn: right for a particular situation or occasion; an occasion when you put on a piece of clothing that is being made for you, to see if it fits properly
example: I thought the memorial was a fitting tribute to the President.

definitionZh: vt  容忍， 宽容； 容许， 承认
definitionEn: to allow people to do, say, or believe something without criticizing or punishing them
example: We simply will not tolerate vigilante groups on our streets.

definitionZh: v  把…叠成堆， 堆放于； 堆积， 堆起; n 整齐的一叠
definitionEn: to put neat piles of things on something
example: He went back to stacking the shelves.

definitionZh: vt  画线于…之下； 强调
definitionEn: to draw a line under a word to show that it is important
example: This tragic incident underlines the need for immediate action.

definitionZh: v  愤恨； 对…表示愤恨， 感到气愤
definitionEn: to feel angry or upset about a situation or about something that someone has done, especially because you think that it is not fair
example: Paul resented the fact that Carol didn’t trust him.

definitionZh: v 模拟，模仿; n  哑剧表演； 哑剧演员
definitionEn: to pretend to play or sing a piece of music, without making any sound; the use of movements to express what you want to say without using words, or a play where the actors use only movements
example: The children learn through role-play, dance and mime.

definitionZh: n  职位低的人， 下属
example: ...underlings who do the dirty work.

definitionZh: n  议会， 国会
definitionEn: the group of people who are elected to make a country’s laws and discuss important national affairs
example: They demanded a free parliament and press.

definitionZh: adj  含糊其辞的； 不明确的， 模棱两可的
definitionEn: something that is ambiguous is unclear, confusing, or not certain, especially because it can be understood in more than one way
example: The language in the Minister’s statement is highly ambiguous.

definitionZh: v  破裂； 发出爆裂声； 重击； 崩溃， 瓦解; n 裂缝，缝隙；爆裂声
definitionEn: to break or to make something break, either so that it gets lines on its surface, or so that it breaks into pieces; a very narrow space between two things or two parts of something
example: Don’t put boiling water in the glass or it will crack.

definitionZh: v  捆绑， 系； 约束； 凝结
definitionEn: if you are bound by an agreement, promise etc, you must do what you have agreed to do or promised to do
example: The monks are bound by vows of silence.

definitionZh: n  立方形； 立方
definitionEn: a solid object with six equal square sides
example: a sugar cube

definitionZh: adj 脆的；利落的
definitionEn: something that is crisp is hard, and makes a pleasant sound when you break it or crush it
example: She kicked at the crisp leaves at her feet.

definitionZh: v  凝结成块; n 凝块
definitionEn: if a liquid such as blood or milk clots, or if something clots it, it becomes thicker and more solid; a thick almost solid mass formed when blood or milk dries
example: The patient's blood refused to clot.

definitionZh: adj  温柔的； 温和的； 轻微的
definitionEn: fairly warm
example: We had an exceptionally mild winter last year.

definitionZh: n  影响， 作用； 冲击
definitionEn: the effect or influence that an event, situation etc has on someone or something
example: The force of the impact knocked the breath out of her.

definitionZh: n 面部的侧影，侧面轮廓；传略，人物简介; vt  扼要介绍； 写传略
definitionEn: a side view of someone’s head; to write or give a short description of someone or something
example: Dani has a lovely profile.

definitionZh: n  瘫痪， 麻痹， 中风
definitionEn: the loss of the ability to move all or part of your body or feel things in it
example: paralysis of the lower body

definitionZh: n  宿舍
definitionEn: a  dormitory
example: My dorm always has the best parties.

definitionZh: n  水桶
definitionEn: an open container with a handle, used for carrying and holding things, especially liquids
example: She threw a bucket of water over them.

definitionZh: adj 资格较老的；年长的; n  较年长者； 毕业班学生
definitionEn: having a higher position, level, or rank; a student in their last year of  high school  or university
example: the senior Democrat on the House committee

definitionZh: n  剂量， 一剂
definitionEn: the amount of a medicine or a drug that you should take
example: I quite like Jamie in small doses (= in limited amounts but not a lot or often ) .

definitionZh: v 胡乱涂抹；弄脏，弄污；诽谤，诋毁；变得模糊不清，
definitionEn: to tell an untrue story about someone important in order to make people lose respect for them – used especially in newspapers
example: an attempt to smear the party leadership

definitionZh: adj  可延伸的， 可展开的， 可扩张的
definitionEn: Something that is extendable can be made longer
example: These were hung in place with extendable rods.

definitionZh: adj 相对的；比较的；有关的，相关的; n  亲属， 亲戚
definitionEn: having a particular quality when compared with something else; a member of your family
example: The relative merits of both approaches have to be considered.

definitionZh: n  态度， 看法； 姿势
definitionEn: the opinions and feelings that you usually have about something, especially when this is shown in your behaviour
example: As soon as they found out I was a doctor, their whole attitude changed.

definitionZh: adj 平均的；平常的，普通的; v  平均达到； 平均为; n 平均
definitionEn: the average amount is the amount you get when you add together several quantities and divide this by the total number of quantities; to usually do something or usually happen a particular number of times, or to usually be a particular size or amount; the amount calculated by adding together several quantities, and then dividing this amount by the total number of quantities
example: The age of the candidates ranged from 29 to 49 with an average age of 37.

definitionZh: n  治疗； 对待
definitionEn: something that is done to cure someone who is injured or ill
example: Just lately, Kyra has been giving me the silent treatment (= refusing to speak to me because she is angry with me ) .

definitionZh: adj  色盲的
definitionEn: unable to see the difference between all or some colours
example: Sixteen times as many men are colour-blind as women.

definitionZh: v  比较； 对比
definitionEn: to consider two or more things or people, in order to show how they are similar or different
example: The report compares the different types of home computer available.

definitionZh: adj  有影响力的； 有权势的
definitionEn: having a lot of influence and therefore changing the way people think and behave
example: He had influential friends.

definitionZh: adj  透明的， 清澈的； 明显的； 易懂的
definitionEn: if something is transparent, you can see through it
example: a transparent plastic container

definitionZh: vt 抓紧；掌握，全面理解; n  抓住； 支配； 理解
definitionEn: to take and hold something firmly; the way you hold something or your ability to hold it
example: I grasped his arm firmly and led him away.

definitionZh: n  杂志； 日报； 日志
definitionEn: a serious magazine produced for professional people or those with a particular interest
example: the British Medical Journal

definitionZh: adj  出众的； 有特色的
definitionEn: having a special quality, character, or appearance that is different and easy to recognize
example: a rock band with a distinctive sound

definitionZh: n  作品； 写作， 作曲； 结构， 组成， 成分
definitionEn: the way in which something is made up of different parts, things, or members
example: Some minerals have complex chemical compositions.

definitionZh: n  交付， 委托； 投递， 发送； 所托运的货物
definitionEn: a quantity of goods that are sent somewhere, especially in order to be sold
example: The first consignment of food was flown in yesterday.

definitionZh: vt  使肥沃， 使多产； 施肥于； 使受精
n  火山
definitionEn: a mountain with a large hole at the top, through which lava(= very hot liquid rock ) is sometimes forced out
example: Pompeii was destroyed when the volcano erupted in 79 AD.

definitionZh: n  取得； 获得物
definitionEn: the process by which you gain knowledge or learn a skill
example: the acquisition of language

definitionZh: adj  严格的， 死板的； 刚硬的， 僵硬的
definitionEn: rigid methods, systems etc are very strict and difficult to change
example: rigid and authoritarian methods of education

definitionZh: n  最后期限
definitionEn: a date or time by which you have to do or complete something
example: I’m always working under pressure to meet deadlines (= finish something on time ) .

definitionZh: n  异常； 偏常行为
adj  感激的， 感谢的
definitionEn: feeling that you want to thank someone because of something kind that they have done, or showing this feeling
example: Our grateful thanks go to all who participated.

definitionZh: n  零售商人； 复述者， 传播者
definitionEn: A retailer is a person or business that sells goods to the public
example: Furniture and carpet retailers are among those reporting the sharpest annual decline in sales.

definitionZh: n  到来； 出现
definitionEn: the time when something first begins to be widely used
example: the advent of the computer

definitionZh: adj  中世纪的； 中古的
definitionEn: connected with the Middle Ages (= the period between about 1100 and 1500 AD )
example: These spices were first brought to Italy from the East in medieval times.

definitionZh: adj  运转的； 操作的； 运营的， 业务的
definitionEn: relating to the operation of a business, government etc
example: Patco accepted full responsibility for operational management.

definitionZh: n 全体职工，工作人员；棒；全体参谋人员; vt  为…配备人员； 任职于
definitionEn: the people who work for an organization; to be or provide the workers for an organization
example: The entire staff has done an outstanding job this year.

definitionZh: vt  使卷入， 使参与； 牵涉， 陷入， 连累； 包含， 含有
definitionEn: if an activity or situation involves something, that thing is part of it or a result of it
example: What will the job involve?

definitionZh: n  油轮； 油罐车； 加油飞机
definitionEn: a vehicle or ship specially built to carry large quantities of gas or liquid, especially oil
example: A Greek oil tanker has run aground.

definitionZh: adj 需要的；必要的; n  必需品； 要素
definitionEn: needed for a particular purpose; A requisite is something that is necessary for a particular purpose
example: He lacks the requisite qualifications.

definitionZh: n  舞台； 戏剧； 阶段
definitionEn: a particular time or state that something reaches as it grows or develops
example: We’re getting to the stage where we hardly ever go out together.

definitionZh: adj  复杂的； 难懂的
definitionEn: difficult to understand or deal with, because many parts or details are involved
example: a complicated voting system

definitionZh: vt  代替， 取代
definitionEn: if a new idea, product, or method supersedes another one, it becomes used instead because it is more modern or effective
example: Their map has since been superseded by photographic atlases.

definitionZh: adj  最大的， 最高的; n 最大量，极限
definitionEn: the maximum amount, quantity, speed etc is the largest that is possible or allowed; the largest number or amount that is possible or is allowed
example: The car has a maximum speed of 120 mph.

definitionZh: adj 沙漠的；荒凉的[dI'zɜːt]; v  舍弃; n 沙漠；荒地
definitionEn: to leave someone or something and no longer help or support them; a large area of land where it is always very dry, and there is a lot of sand
example: Helen was deserted by her husband.

definitionZh: n  方言， 土语
definitionEn: a form of a language which is spoken only in one area, with words or grammar that are slightly different from other forms of the same language
example: the local dialect

definitionZh: n  紧急情况， 突发事件
definitionEn: an unexpected and dangerous situation that must be dealt with immediately
example: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies.

definitionZh: n  才能； 学院， 系； 全体教学人员
definitionEn: a department or group of related departments within a university
example: the Engineering Faculty

definitionZh: n  护照； 途径， 路子， 手段
definitionEn: a small official document that you get from your government, that proves who you are, and which you need in order to leave your country and enter other countries
example: I have an Irish passport.

definitionZh: n  石灰石， 石灰岩
definitionEn: a type of rock that contains calcium
example: ...high limestone cliffs.

definitionZh: n  魅力； 诱惑力
example: This is the power of glamor of debate!

definitionZh: n  露营者， 宿营者
definitionEn: someone who is staying in a tent or shelter
example: My fellow campers were already packing up their tents.

definitionZh: n  线索； 提示
definitionEn: an object or piece of information that helps someone solve a crime or mystery
example: Police have found a vital clue .

definitionZh: n  〈总称〉 家畜， 牲畜
definitionEn: animals such as cows and sheep that are kept on a farm
example: The heavy rains and flooding killed scores of livestock.

definitionZh: adj  法律的； 合法的
definitionEn: if something is legal, you are allowed to do it or have to do it by law
example: What the company has done is perfectly legal.

definitionZh: n  中间
definitionEn: in a particular group
example: I fear we have an enemy in our midst.

definitionZh: n  公路
definitionEn: a wide main road that joins one town to another
example: Interstate Highway 75

definitionZh: n  半径； 周围， 范围
definitionEn: the distance from the centre to the edge of a circle, or a line drawn from the centre to the edge
example: The shock of the explosion was felt over a radius of forty miles.

definitionZh: adj  熔化的
definitionEn: molten metal or rock has been made into a liquid by being heated to a very high temperature
example: molten iron

definitionZh: v  发信号； 标志着; n 信号；暗号；标志
definitionEn: to make a sound or action in order to give information or tell someone to do something; a sound or action that you make in order to give information to someone or tell them to do something
example: She signalled, and the waiter brought the bill.

definitionZh: vt  损害； 削弱
definitionEn: to damage something or make it not as good as it should be
example: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate.

definitionZh: n  包裹
definitionEn: an object that has been wrapped in paper or put in a special envelope, especially so that it can be sent by post
example: The parcel was delivered last week.

definitionZh: n 静电；[-s]
definitionEn: noise caused by electricity in the air that blocks or spoils the sound from radio or TV
example: When the weather turns cold and dry, my clothes develop a static problem.

definitionZh: adj  自身免疫的
definitionEn: Autoimmune describes medical conditions in which normal cells are attacked by the body's immune system
example: ...autoimmune diseases such as rheumatoid arthritis.

definitionZh: v  使非常疲倦， 使疲惫不堪； 用尽， 耗尽; n  废气， 蒸汽
definitionEn: to use all of something; the gas produced when an engine is working
example: We are in danger of exhausting the world’s oil supply.

definitionZh: adj  可溶的； 可解决的
definitionEn: a soluble substance can be  dissolved  in a liquid
example: soluble aspirin

definitionZh: n  节省； 削减
definitionEn: Retrenchment means spending less money
example: Defence planners predict an extended period of retrenchment.

definitionZh: n  定罪； 坚信， 确信
definitionEn: a very strong belief or opinion
example: It was a reasonable explanation, but his voice lacked conviction .

definitionZh: n 带子; vt  捆扎； 包扎
definitionEn: a narrow band of strong material that is used to fasten, hang, or hold onto something; to tie  bandage s  firmly round a part of your body that has been hurt
example: a bra strap

definitionZh: n  稻草； 吸管
definitionEn: a thin tube of paper or plastic for sucking up liquid from a bottle or a cup
example: She sipped her lemonade through a straw.

definitionZh: v  多样化
definitionEn: if a business, company, country etc diversifies, it increases the range of goods or services it produces
example: We need to diversify the economy.

definitionZh: adj  发明的， 创造的； 善于发明创造的
definitionEn: able to think of new, different, or interesting ideas
example: one of the most talented and inventive drummers in modern music

definitionZh: n  图， 图表， 曲线图
definitionEn: a drawing that uses a line or lines to show how two or more sets of measurements are related to each other
example: Martin showed me a graph of their recent sales.

definitionZh: prep  关于
definitionEn: a word used especially in letters or speeches to introduce the subject you are writing or talking about
example: Regarding your recent inquiry, I have enclosed a copy of our new brochure.

definitionZh: n  汽油
definitionEn: a liquid obtained from  petroleum  that is used to supply power to the engine of cars and other vehicles
example: unleaded petrol

definitionZh: v  把遣返回国； 归国
definitionEn: to send someone back to their own country
example: After the war, prisoners were repatriated.

definitionZh: adj  自命不凡的， 自负的； 炫耀的； 做作的
definitionEn: if someone or something is pretentious, they try to seem more important, intelligent, or high class than they really are in order to be impressive
example: a pretentious film

definitionZh: v 对付，处理；向某人提起；抢截，抢球; n  用具， 器具； 滑轮， 滑车； 抢截
definitionEn: to try to deal with a difficult problem; ropes and  pulleys (= wheels )  used for lifting heavy things
example: There is more than one way to tackle the problem.

definitionZh: adj  大规模的， 大范围的
definitionEn: using or involving a lot of effort, people, supplies etc
example: a large-scale rescue operation

definitionZh: vi 逃避责任；旷课; n  逃学者； 逃避者
definitionEn: a student who stays away from school without permission
example: persistent truants

definitionZh: vt  转移； 使分心
definitionEn: to take someone’s attention away from something by making them look at or listen to something else
example: Try not to distract the other students.

definitionZh: n  流行性感冒
definitionEn: an infectious disease that is like a very bad cold
example: All the medical workers in the region helped to put down the influenza epidemic.

definitionZh: n 时刻，时候；场合；重大活动，盛会；时机，机会；起因，理由; vt  引起， 惹起
definitionEn: an important social event or ceremony; to cause something
example: I’m saving this bottle of champagne for a special occasion.

definitionZh: v 压榨，榨取；捏，挤压；挤入，挤过；向…勒索; n  挤压， 捏； 紧缺， 拮据， 经济困难； 减少， 削减
definitionEn: to press something firmly together with your fingers or hand; an act of pressing something firmly with your fingers or hand
example: She smiled as he squeezed her hand.

definitionZh: n&vt  贷款， 借
definitionEn: an amount of money that you borrow from a bank etc
example: I had to take out a loan to buy my car.

definitionZh: adj  有价值的； 值得的
definitionEn: deserving respect from people
example: Leeds United were worthy winners of the competition.

definitionZh: v  狂饮， 暴饮； 大量消耗
definitionEn: to eat or drink a lot of something, eagerly and quickly – usually showing disapproval
example: They’ve been guzzling beer all evening.

definitionZh: n 期待，预期；
definitionEn: what you think or hope will happen
example: Having raised expectations (= made people more hopeful ), he went on to help only a few people.

definitionZh: n  变质； 损坏
definitionEn: waste resulting from something being spoiled
example: Monitors and investigates spoilage and recommends appropriate actions to reduce.

definitionZh: n  药剂师， 配药师； 分配者， 施予者； 自动售货机
definitionEn: a machine which provides a particular amount of a product or substance when you press a button or put money into it
example: a paper towel dispenser

definitionZh: n  持续， 持续的时间， 期间
definitionEn: the length of time that something continues
example: The course is of three years’ duration.

definitionZh: v 装载；装; n  负荷； 装载
definitionEn: to put a large quantity of something into a vehicle or container; a large quantity of something that is carried by a vehicle, person etc
example: Have you finished loading up?

definitionZh: n  久经世故的人； 精通者
definitionEn: someone who is sophisticated

definitionZh: v  渡运; n 渡船；摆渡
definitionEn: to carry people or things a short distance from one place to another in a boat or other vehicle; a boat that carries people or goods across a river or a narrow area of water
example: Every day, a plane arrives to ferry guests to and from Bird Island Lodge.

definitionZh: v  服水土； 适应新环境
example: This year he has left for St Louis early to acclimatise himself.

definitionZh: vt  不顾， 不理， 忽视
definitionEn: to deliberately pay no attention to something that you have been told or that you know about
example: You can’t ignore the fact that many criminals never go to prison.

definitionZh: n  半球； 大脑半球
definitionEn: a half of the Earth, especially one of the halves above and below the  equator
example: the Northern hemisphere

definitionZh: adj  核能的， 原子能的
definitionEn: relating to or involving the nucleus (= central part ) of an atom, or the energy produced when the nucleus of an atom is either split or joined with the nucleus of another atom
example: France’s reliance on nuclear energy

definitionZh: v  鼓掌， 喝彩； 称赞
definitionEn: to hit your open hands together, to show that you have enjoyed a play, concert, speaker etc
example: The audience applauded loudly.

definitionZh: adj  月的； 月亮的
definitionEn: relating to the Moon or to travel to the Moon
example: studies of the lunar surface

definitionZh: v  放松
definitionEn: to rest or do something that is enjoyable, especially after you have been working
example: I just want to sit down and relax.

definitionZh: n 接力赛；中继设备['riːleI;ri'leI]; vt  传送； 转播
definitionEn: a relay race; if radio or television signals are relayed, they are received and sent, especially so that they can be heard on the radio or seen on television
example: the 100 metres relay

definitionZh: n  房屋， 家， 住所
definitionEn: someone’s home – sometimes used humorously
example: Welcome to my humble abode.

definitionZh: n  允许， 准许
definitionEn: If someone who has authority over you gives you permission to do something, they say that they will allow you to do it
example: He asked permission to leave the room.

definitionZh: adv  统计上地
example: But until now, no trials have been statistically powered to address effects on survival.

definitionZh: adj  宏伟的； 大的
definitionEn: big and very impressive
example: a grand country house

definitionZh: v  扩散， 弥漫； 渗透， 渗入
definitionEn: if liquid, gas etc permeates something, it enters it and spreads through every part of it
example: The smell of diesel oil permeated the air.

definitionZh: vt 安排；列入，收进; n  时刻表； 清单
definitionEn: to plan that something will happen at a particular time; a list that shows the times that buses, trains etc leave or arrive at a particular place
example: We will not cancel your holiday less than eight weeks before the scheduled departure date .

definitionZh: n  恶化； 堕落
example: Underneath the siding is a "splash base" to further prevent deterioration.

definitionZh: v  解释， 说明； 口译， 翻译
definitionEn: to translate spoken words from one language into another
example: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.

definitionZh: n  宇宙， 天地万物； 世界； 领域
definitionEn: all space, including all the stars and planets
example: Einstein's equations showed the universe to be expanding.

definitionZh: n  毯子； 厚的覆盖物
definitionEn: a cover for a bed, usually made of wool
example: The mud disappeared under a blanket of snow.

definitionZh: v  同意， 承认； 给予， 授予; n 授予物；补助金，助学金，津贴；授权
definitionEn: to give someone something or allow them to have something that they have asked for; an amount of money given to someone, especially by the government, for a particular purpose
example: Britain could grant Spain’s request .

definitionZh: n  时事通讯， 业务通讯
definitionEn: a short written report of news about a club, organization etc that is sent regularly to people who are interested
example: The society publishes a newsletter twice a year.

definitionZh: adj  能传导电的， 导电的
definitionEn: able to conduct electricity, heat etc
example: Copper is a very conductive metal.

definitionZh: n  折扣; vt  给…打折； 漠视， 低估
definitionEn: a reduction in the usual price of something; If a shop or company discounts an amount or percentage from something that they are selling, they take the amount or percentage off the usual price
example: They are often available at a discount.

definitionZh: vt 建造；构思，构筑；创立['kɒnstrʌkt]; n  构想， 观念
definitionEn: to build something such as a house, bridge, road etc; an idea formed by combining several pieces of information or knowledge
example: There are plans to construct a new road bridge across the river.

definitionZh: v  改变信仰， 皈依； 转变， 转化； 改装
definitionEn: to change into a different form, or change into something that can be used for a different purpose or in a different way
example: The signal will be converted into digital code.

definitionZh: n&v  尝试， 试图； 努力
definitionEn: an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult
example: Weather conditions prevented them from attempting the jump.

definitionZh: n  分开， 分隔； 分配； 分歧； 除； 部门， 科， 司
definitionEn: the act of separating something into two or more different parts, or the way these parts are separated or shared
example: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife

definitionZh: n  航空， 航海， 航行； 导航， 领航
definitionEn: the science or job of planning which way you need to go when you are travelling from one place to another
example: compasses and other instruments of navigation

definitionZh: adj  不新鲜的； 陈腐的
definitionEn: bread or cake that is stale is no longer fresh or good to eat
example: French bread goes stale (= becomes stale ) very quickly.

definitionZh: n 平衡；余额; vt  平衡
definitionEn: a state in which all your weight is evenly spread so that you do not fall; to be in or get into a steady position, without falling to one side or the other, or to put something into this position
example: I lost my balance and fell on my face.

definitionZh: n  指纹， 手印
definitionEn: a mark made by the pattern of lines at the end of a person’s finger, which is used by the police to find out who has committed a crime
example: His fingerprints were all over the gun.

definitionZh: v 投掷；颠簸；为…定音高; n  沥青； 场地； 程度； 最高点； 音高
definitionEn: if a ship or an aircraft pitches, it moves up and down in an uncontrolled way with the movement of the water or air; a marked out area of ground on which a sport is played
example: She crumpled up the page and pitched it into the fire.

definitionZh: conj  然而， 但是
definitionEn: used to say that although something is true of one thing, it is not true of another
example: The old system was fairly complicated whereas the new system is really very simple.

definitionZh: n  洪流； 爆发； 连发
definitionEn: A torrent is a lot of water falling or flowing rapidly or violently
example: Torrents of water gushed into the reservoir.

definitionZh: adj  电的， 电学的， 有关电的
definitionEn: relating to electricity
example: The fire was caused by an electrical fault.

definitionZh: n  塑像
definitionEn: an image of a person or animal that is made in solid material such as stone or metal and is usually large
example: Churchill’s statue stands outside the parliament building.

definitionZh: n  货摊； 小隔间
definitionEn: a table or a small shop with an open front, especially outdoors, where goods are sold
example: a market stall

definitionZh: n  分类； 级别
definitionEn: a process in which you put something into the group or class it belongs to
example: the classification of wines according to quality

definitionZh: v  酿造； 冲泡； 酝酿
definitionEn: to make beer
example: Every beer on the menu was brewed locally.

definitionZh: n 咖喱，
definitionEn: a type of food from India, consisting of meat or vegetables in a spicy sauce
example: chicken curry

definitionZh: n  声称， 自命； 自负， 自命不凡
definitionEn: an attempt to seem more important, more intelligent, or of a higher class than you really are
example: the humbleness and lack of pretension of Jordan’s cafe

definitionZh: n 威胁；危险的人; vt  威胁到， 危及
definitionEn: something or someone that is dangerous; to threaten
example: the growing menace of oil pollution at sea

definitionZh: v  偏斜， 转向
definitionEn: if someone or something deflects something that is moving, or if it deflects, it turns in a different direction
example: He deflected the blow with his forearm.
