definitionZh: adj  有道德的， 品性好的， 品德高的； 自命清高的； 贞洁的
definitionEn: behaving in a very honest and moral way
example: a virtuous man

definitionZh: adj 无效的，作废的；无可靠根据的，站不住脚的；有病的，伤残的['ɪnvælɪd]; n  病弱者， 残疾者
definitionEn: a contract, ticket, claim etc that is invalid is not legally or officially acceptable; someone who cannot look after themselves because of illness, old age, or injury
example: Without the right date stamped on it, your ticket will be invalid.

definitionZh: v  同步发生， 同速进行
adj  合法的， 法定的； 正当的， 合情合理的; vt  使合法
definitionEn: fair or reasonable
example: That’s a perfectly legitimate question.

definitionZh: n  间隔， 幕间休息； 间距
definitionEn: the period of time between two events, activities etc
example: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.

definitionZh: adj 世界性的，全球的; n  世界主义者； 四海为家者
definitionEn: a cosmopolitan place has people from many different parts of the world – use this to show approval
example: a vibrant, cosmopolitan city

definitionZh: vt  评价， 估价
definitionEn: to judge how good, useful, or successful something is
example: You should be able to evaluate your own work.

definitionZh: n  极小量； 螨虫
definitionEn: a very small creature that lives in plants,  carpet s  etc
example: ...an itching skin disorder caused by parasitic mites.

definitionZh: adj  歪斜的; vt 使偏；曲解
definitionEn: if something skews the results of a test etc, it affects them, making them incorrect
example: However there is some notable right skew.

definitionZh: n  地位； 身份； 状况
definitionEn: the official legal position or condition of a person, group, country etc
example: These documents have no legal status in Britain.

definitionZh: adj  语义的
definitionEn: relating to the meanings of words
example: He did not want to enter into a semantic debate.

definitionZh: adj  心烦的； 不适的; vt 使苦恼；搅乱；推翻，颠倒[ˌʌp's3t]
definitionEn: unhappy and worried because something unpleasant or disappointing has happened; to change a plan or situation in a way that causes problems
example: You’re not still upset with me, are you?

definitionZh: v  打点于； 散布于， 点缀; n 点，小圆点
definitionEn: to put a very small amount of something on a surface, especially in several places; a small round mark or spot
example: Poppies dotted the field.

definitionZh: v  撇去； 掠过， 擦过； 浏览， 略读
definitionEn: to remove something from the surface of a liquid, especially floating fat, solids, or oil
example: Julie skimmed the sports page.

definitionZh: v 跺，重踏；在…上盖；
definitionEn: to put your foot down onto the ground loudly and with a lot of force
example: The audience stamped and shouted.

definitionZh: v  跳， 蹦； 漏过； 逃学
definitionEn: to not read, mention, or deal with something that would normally come or happen next
example: I decided to skip the first chapter.

definitionZh: v  散布， 传播
definitionEn: to spread information or ideas to as many people as possible
example: Her findings have been widely disseminated .

definitionZh: n  大批离去， 成群外出
definitionEn: If there is an exodus of people from a place, a lot of people leave that place at the same time
example: The medical system is facing collapse because of an exodus of doctors.

definitionZh: n&v  提及， 说起
definitionEn: to talk or write about something or someone, usually quickly and without saying very much or giving details
example: Was my name mentioned at all?

definitionZh: v  流出; n 溪流；一股
definitionEn: to flow quickly and in great amounts; a long and almost continuous series of events, people, objects etc
example: Tears streamed down their faces.

definitionZh: n  洗衣房； 待洗衣服
definitionEn: clothes, sheets etc that need to be washed or have just been washed
example: She did the laundry (= washed the clothes etc ) and hung it out to dry.

definitionZh: n 不满，积怨，
definitionEn: If you have or bear a grudge against someone, you have unfriendly feelings toward them because of something they did in the past
example: He appears to have a grudge against certain players.

definitionZh: v  积累； 堆积
definitionEn: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.

definitionZh: n  罪行； 犯罪
definitionEn: illegal activities in general
example: We moved here because there was very little crime.

definitionZh: vt  围绕； 包围
definitionEn: to be all around someone or something on every side
example: He glared at the people who surrounded the tent.

definitionZh: n  空闲时间； 悠闲
definitionEn: time when you are not working or studying and can relax and do things you enjoy
example: Most people now enjoy shorter working hours and more leisure time.

definitionZh: n  人行道； 地面， 路面
definitionEn: a hard level surface or path at the side of a road for people to walk on
example: A small group of journalists waited on the pavement outside her house.

definitionZh: adj  未被发现的
definitionEn: if something, especially something bad, goes undetected, no one notices it
example: The thieves escaped undetected through a basement window.

definitionZh: n  不规则， 无规律
example: Its complexity degree can be quantitatively evaluated using fractal dimension that can describe geometrical irregularity.

definitionZh: v  吸收； 使同化
definitionEn: if people assimilate, or are assimilated into a country or group, they become part of that group and are accepted by the people in that group
example: It will take time to assimilate all these facts.

definitionZh: adj  道德的； 伦理的
definitionEn: relating to principles of what is right and wrong
example: The president must have the highest ethical standards.

definitionZh: n  耕种， 耕作； 培养， 教育
definitionEn: the preparation and use of land for growing crops
example: soil cultivation

definitionZh: n  吸毒成瘾的人， 有瘾的人， 对…入迷的人
definitionEn: someone who is unable to stop taking drugs
example: He's only 24 years old and a drug addict.

definitionZh: n  令人惊奇的； 奇特的， 非凡的； 奇迹般的， 不可思议的； 绝妙的
n  铝
definitionEn: a silver-white metal that is very light and is used to make cans, cooking pans, window frames etc. It is a chemical  element  : symbol Al
example: recycled aluminium cans

definitionZh: adj  值得信赖的， 可靠的
definitionEn: able to be trusted and depended on
example: He is a trustworthy and level-headed leader.

definitionZh: adj  可比较的， 类似的； 比得上的
definitionEn: similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.

definitionZh: n  自尊； 自负
definitionEn: the feeling of being satisfied with your own abilities, and that you deserve to be liked or respected
example: students’ sense of self-esteem

definitionZh: adj  …度空间的， …维的
example: If the dimensional shift in either direction is greater than our previously set threshold, increment the total deviation by the amount moved in both directions.

definitionZh: adv  推测起来， 大概
definitionEn: used to say that you think something is probably true
example: It’s raining, which presumably means that your football match will be cancelled.

definitionZh: adj  受…支配的， 取决于…的； 易遭受…的; n 题目；学科；主语['sʌbdʒ3kt]
definitionEn: To be subject to something means to be affected by it or to be likely to be affected by it; the thing you are talking about or considering in a conversation, discussion, book, film etc
example: Prices may be subject to alteration.

definitionZh: n  奖金， 红利； 好处
definitionEn: money added to someone’s wages, especially as a reward for good work
example: Long-term savers qualify for a cash bonus.

definitionZh: n  识别； 认出； 承认， 确认， 认可； 赏识， 表彰
definitionEn: the act of realizing and accepting that something is true or important
example: He has achieved recognition and respect as a scientist.

definitionZh: n  走廊， 通道； 侧廊
definitionEn: a long passage between rows of seats in a church, plane, theatre etc, or between rows of shelves in a shop
example: Would you like a window seat or an aisle seat (=  seat next to the aisle  ) ?

definitionZh: n 安排；
definitionEn: plans and preparations that you must make so that something can happen
example: Have you made all your travel arrangements?

definitionZh: n  收入； 税收
definitionEn: money that a business or organization receives over a period of time, especially from selling goods or services
example: advertising revenue

definitionZh: v 剥夺；夺去，使空无一物；拆卸，拆开; n  带状物； 条纹； 狭长地带， 带状水域
definitionEn: to remove something that is covering the surface of something else; a long narrow piece of paper, cloth etc
example: Strip the beds and wash the sheets.

definitionZh: n  垄断， 专卖； 垄断商品， 专卖商品
definitionEn: if a company or government has a monopoly of a business or political activity, it has complete control of it so that other organizations cannot compete with it
example: a monopoly in copper trading

definitionZh: adj  连续的， 不断的
definitionEn: continuing to happen or exist without stopping
example: continuous economic growth

definitionZh: adj  两种语言的
definitionEn: written or spoken in two languages
example: a bilingual dictionary

definitionZh: n  住宅， 住处； 居住
definitionEn: a house, especially a large or official one
example: the ambassador’s official residence

definitionZh: n  氧， 氧气
definitionEn: a gas that has no colour or smell, is present in air, and is necessary for most animals and plants to live. It is a chemical element: symbol O
example: The human brain needs to be without oxygen for only four minutes before permanent damage occurs.

definitionZh: adj  加强的； 密集的
definitionEn: involving a lot of activity, effort, or careful attention in a short period of time
example: a one-week intensive course in English

definitionZh: vt  改变； 变动
definitionEn: to change, or to make someone or something change
example: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.

definitionZh: v  联合， 结合
definitionEn: if you combine two or more different things, or if they combine, they begin to exist or work together
example: Diets are most effective when combined with exercise.

definitionZh: adj 理想的，完美的；理想主义的；空想的；唯心的; n  理想； 理想的东西
definitionEn: the best or most suitable that something could possibly be; a principle about what is morally right or a perfect standard that you hope to achieve
example: advice on how to reach your ideal weight

definitionZh: n  喜剧； 喜剧性
definitionEn: entertainment that is intended to make people laugh
example: a career in stand-up comedy

definitionZh: n  扫帚
definitionEn: a large brush with a long handle, used for sweeping floors
example: Deer brought the broom.

definitionZh: n  设备， 装备
definitionEn: the tools, machines etc that you need to do a particular job or activity
example: a shop selling camping equipment

definitionZh: n 压力，压强；强制，压迫; vt  对…施加压力； 迫使， 说服
definitionEn: an attempt to persuade someone by using influence, arguments, or threats; to try to make someone do something by making them feel it is their duty to do it
example: They are putting pressure on people to vote yes.

definitionZh: v 沉思；孵蛋; n  一窝
definitionEn: to keep thinking about something that you are worried or upset about; a family of young birds all born at the same time
example: Don’t sit at home brooding all day.

definitionZh: n  有文化； 有教养； 读写能力
definitionEn: the state of being able to read and write
example: a new adult literacy campaign

definitionZh: v 喂养，为…提供食物；吃，以…为食; n  饲料
definitionEn: to give someone information or ideas over a period time; food for animals
example: We brought along pieces of old bread and fed the birds.

definitionZh: v  起源， 发生； 首创， 创造
definitionEn: to come from a particular place or start in a particular situation
example: How did the plan originate?

definitionZh: n 罗盘，罗盘仪；界限，范围；
definitionEn: an instrument that shows directions and has a needle that always points north
example: a map and compass

definitionZh: n  解毒药； 矫正方法
definitionEn: a substance that stops the effects of a poison
example: When he returned, he noticed their sickness and prepared an antidote.

definitionZh: n  背景； 经历； 后台； 不重要或不引人注目的地方
definitionEn: someone’s family, education, previous work etc
example: Students with a background in chemistry will probably find the course easier.

definitionZh: n  宪法， 章程； 体质， 体格； 组成， 形成
definitionEn: a set of basic laws and principles that a country or organization is governed by
example: The right to speak freely is written into the Constitution of the United States.

definitionZh: v 混合，混杂; n  混合物； 混合， 交融
definitionEn: to thoroughly mix together soft or liquid substances to form a single smooth substance; a product such as tea, tobacco, or  whisky  that is a mixture of several different types
example: Blend the sugar, eggs, and flour.

definitionZh: v  想出， 构想， 设想； 怀孕
definitionEn: to imagine a particular situation or to think about something in a particular way
example: Scientists first conceived the idea of the atomic bomb in the 1930’s.

definitionZh: vt 染污；给…着色; n  污点
definitionEn: to accidentally make a mark on something, especially one that cannot be removed, or to be marked in this way; a mark that is difficult to remove, especially one made by a liquid such as blood, coffee, or ink
example: Be careful you don’t stain the carpet.

definitionZh: adj 身体的，肉体的；物理的，物理学的；物质的，有形的; n  体检
definitionEn: related to someone’s body rather than their mind or emotions; a thorough examination of someone’s body by a doctor, in order to discover whether they are healthy or have any illnesses or medical problems
example: She was in constant physical pain.

definitionZh: n  零售业
definitionEn: the business of selling goods to customers in shops
example: There may be many job losses in retailing.

definitionZh: vt  实现， 完成； 满足
definitionEn: if you fulfil a hope, wish, or aim, you achieve the thing that you hoped for, wished for etc
example: Visiting Disneyland has fulfilled a boyhood dream .

definitionZh: n  橘子； 达官贵人， 官僚； [M-] 普通话
definitionEn: a kind of small orange with skin that is easy to remove

definitionZh: n 结构；构造；建筑物; vt  系统安排； 精心组织
definitionEn: the way in which the parts of something are connected with each other and form a whole, or the thing that these parts make up; to arrange the different parts of something into a pattern or system in which each part is connected to the others
example: challenges to the existing power structure

definitionZh: n 桩；火刑柱；利害关系；股份；
definitionEn: if you have a stake in a business, you have  invested  money in it
example: Young people don’t feel they have a stake in the country’s future.

definitionZh: n  强烈， 剧烈； 强度
definitionEn: the quality of being felt very strongly or having a strong effect
example: The intensity of the hurricane was frightening.

definitionZh: v  目击； 为…作证; n 证据；目击者
definitionEn: used to introduce an example that proves something you have just mentioned; someone who sees a crime or an accident and can describe what happened
example: Bad economic times can result in political dictatorships. Witness Germany in the 1930s.

definitionZh: adj  到期的， 预期的； 应有的， 应得的； 正当的
definitionEn: expected to happen or arrive at a particular time
example: Any money due you will be sent by cheque through the post.

definitionZh: vi  遵守， 服从； 适应， 顺应； 相一致， 相符合
definitionEn: to obey a law, rule etc
example: the pressure on schoolchildren to conform

definitionZh: n  循环， 流通； 流传， 传播； 发行， 发行量
definitionEn: the movement of blood around your body
example: Exercise improves the circulation.

definitionZh: adj  真品的， 真迹的； 真正的， 真实的， 逼真的
definitionEn: a painting, document, book etc that is authentic has been proved to be by a particular person
example: an authentic work by Picasso

definitionZh: n  偶然性， 可能性； 意外事件； 附带事件
definitionEn: an event or situation that might happen in the future, especially one that could cause problems
example: a contingency plan

definitionZh: vt 嘲笑，讥笑
definitionEn: If someone taunts you, they say unkind or insulting things to you, especially about your weaknesses or failures
example: A gang taunted a disabled man.

definitionZh: v  混入， 混杂
definitionEn: to mix together, or mix things together（
example: Why did another universe intermix itself with the universe of which Earth is a part?

definitionZh: v  通知； 向…报告
definitionEn: to officially tell someone about something or give them information
example: They decided to inform the police.

definitionZh: vi  依靠， 依赖； 信赖， 相信； 决定于， 视…而定
definitionEn: If you say that one thing depends on another, you mean that the first thing will be affected or determined by the second
example: The cooking time needed depends on the size of the potato.

definitionZh: n  缺乏， 短缺
definitionEn: a situation in which there are very few of something that people want or need
example: EXCEPT as Pearl, in the dearth of human playmates, was thrown more upon the visionary throng which she created.

definitionZh: v  把…交托给， 提交； 犯， 干
definitionEn: to do something wrong or illegal
example: Women commit fewer crimes than men.

definitionZh: adj  经验主义的， 以经验为依据的
definitionEn: based on scientific testing or practical experience, not on ideas
example: {"COLLOINEXA":["empirical evidence"]}

definitionZh: vt  超越， 胜过
definitionEn: to be better or more successful than someone else at doing something
example: When it comes to speed of response, a small firm can outdo a big company.

definitionZh: n  悲哀； 伤心事
definitionEn: a feeling of great sadness, usually because someone has died or because something terrible has happened to you
example: the family’s joys and sorrows

definitionZh: vt 控制，抑制，约束; n  路缘， 镶边石； 马勒； 起限制作用的事物
definitionEn: to control or limit something in order to prevent it from having a harmful effect; the raised edge of a road, between where people can walk and cars can drive
example: measures to curb the spread of the virus

definitionZh: v 碰撞；冲，闯；倒下，坠落；发出撞击声；垮台，破产; adj  速成的; n 碰撞；坠落，坠毁；破裂声，撞击声
definitionEn: to have an accident in a car, plane etc by violently hitting something else; a sudden loud noise made by something falling, breaking etc
example: The jet crashed after take-off.

definitionZh: n  降雨， 降水； 仓促， 急躁； 【化】 沉淀作用
definitionEn: rain, snow etc that falls on the ground, or the amount of rain, snow etc that falls

definitionZh: n  性格， 品质； 性质， 特性； 人物， 角色； 符号， 字
definitionEn: the particular combination of qualities that makes someone a particular type of person
example: He has a cheerful but quiet character.

definitionZh: adj  磁的， 有磁性的； 有吸引力的
definitionEn: concerning or produced by  magnetism
example: magnetic forces

definitionZh: n  胆固醇
definitionEn: a chemical substance found in your blood. Too much cholesterol in your body may cause heart disease.
example: So why would you want to lower your cholesterol?

definitionZh: v  沿轨道运行； 围绕…运动; n 轨道；影响范围，势力范围
definitionEn: to travel in a curved path around a much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc; the curved path travelled by an object which is moving around another much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
example: The satellite orbits the Earth every 48 hours.

definitionZh: n  乐队； 群， 伙； 带， 箍； 条纹； 波段， 频带; vt  用带绑扎
definitionEn: a group of musicians, especially a group that plays popular music
example: The band was playing old Beatles songs.

definitionZh: adj  常驻的， 居住的; n 居民，住户
definitionEn: living in a place; someone who lives or stays in a particular place
example: a resident tutor

definitionZh: vt  包含； 由…组成
definitionEn: to consist of particular parts, groups etc
example: The house comprises two bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room.

definitionZh: n  海拔； 身高
definitionEn: how tall someone or something is
example: Sam’s about the same height as his sister now.

definitionZh: adj 温和的；适度的['mɒdəreɪt]; v  减轻， 缓和； 使适中
definitionEn: not very large or very small, very hot or very cold, very fast or very slow etc; to make something less extreme or violent, or to become less extreme or violent
example: Even moderate amounts of alcohol can be dangerous.

definitionZh: n  听筒； 接收器
definitionEn: the part of a telephone that you hold next to your mouth and ear
example: a satellite receiver

definitionZh: n  仓鼠
definitionEn: a small animal that looks like a mouse with no tail
example: Without Leaders, we would be spinning in a hamster wheel with no real vision.

definitionZh: n  模块； 模式； 舱； 组件； 单元
definitionEn: one of the separate units that a course of study has been divided into. Usually students choose a number of modules to study
example: a module in mathematics

definitionZh: n  购物中心
definitionEn: a large area where there are a lot of shops, usually a covered area where cars are not allowed
example: Let’s meet at the mall and go see a movie.

definitionZh: adj  可观的， 大量的； 坚固的， 结实的； 实质的； 大体上的
definitionEn: large in amount or number
example: We have the support of a substantial number of parents.

definitionZh: vt  将…处死； 实施， 执行
definitionEn: to kill someone, especially legally as a punishment
example: 13 people were summarily executed (= killed without any trial or legal process ) by the guerrillas.

definitionZh: v 使受益；有益于，
definitionEn: if you benefit from something, or it benefits you, it gives you an advantage, improves your life, or helps you in some way
example: They are working together to benefit the whole community.

definitionZh: v  把…制成麦芽； 变成麦芽; n 麦芽；麦芽酒
definitionEn: grain, usually  barley  , that has been kept in water for a time and then dried. It is used for making beer,  whisky  etc.

definitionZh: n  小房间； 公用电话亭； 售货棚
definitionEn: a small partly enclosed place where one person can do something privately, such as use the telephone or vote
example: a voting booth

definitionZh: adj  唯一的， 独一无二的； 极不寻常的， 极好的
definitionEn: unusually good and special
example: a unique opportunity to study these rare creatures

definitionZh: vt 使增长，使兴旺；鼓励，促进；为…作宣传，宣扬; n  增加， 提高； 帮助， 激励
definitionEn: to increase or improve something and make it more successful; something that gives someone more confidence, or that helps something increase, improve, or become successful
example: The new resort area has boosted tourism.

definitionZh: adj  真挚的， 诚挚的， 真诚的， 诚恳的
definitionEn: a feeling, belief, or statement that is sincere is honest and true, and based on what you really feel and believe
example: Please accept my sincere apologies .

definitionZh: v  翻， 倾覆
definitionEn: if a boat capsizes, or if you capsize it, it turns over in the water
example: The sea got very rough and the boat capsized.

definitionZh: n  部
definitionEn: a government department that is responsible for one of the areas of government work, such as education or health
example: ...the Ministry of Justice.

definitionZh: adj  母亲的； 母系的
definitionEn: typical of the way a good mother behaves or feels
example: Annie was wonderfully warm and maternal.

definitionZh: vt  把…开除； 驱逐
definitionEn: to officially force someone to leave a school or organization
example: More than five-thousand high school students have been expelled for cheating.

definitionZh: v  掩蔽； 躲避; n 掩蔽，隐蔽；住所；保护
definitionEn: to stay in or under a place where you are protected from the weather or from danger; protection from danger or from wind, rain, hot sun etc
example: Collins was arrested for sheltering enemy soldiers.

definitionZh: vt  检查； 调查， 研究； 测验
definitionEn: to look at something carefully and thoroughly because you want to find out more about it
example: A team of divers was sent down to examine the wreck.

definitionZh: n 纬度；
definitionEn: the distance north or south of the equator(= the imaginary line around the middle of the world ), measured in degrees
example: The birds breed in northern latitudes.

definitionZh: v 扫描；浏览; n  扫描
definitionEn: to read something quickly; a medical test in which a special machine produces a picture of something inside your body
example: She scanned through the paper.

definitionZh: n  协会
definitionEn: an organization that consists of a group of people who have the same aims, do the same kind of work etc
example: the Association of Master Builders

definitionZh: vt  消灭， 消除； 淘汰
definitionEn: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
example: Our team was eliminated in the first round.

definitionZh: n  垃圾堆； 垃圾填筑地， 废渣埋填地
definitionEn: a place where waste is buried under the ground
example: ...the environmental costs of landfill.

definitionZh: vt  增加， 提高， 扩大
definitionEn: to increase the value, amount, effectiveness etc of something
example: Any surplus was sold to augment their income.

definitionZh: adj  可辨认的， 可识别的； 可确定的， 可证明是同一的
definitionEn: able to be recognized
example: In the corridor were four dirty, ragged bundles, just identifiable as human beings.

definitionZh: n  子宫； 发源地
definitionEn: the part of a woman’s or female animal’s body where her baby grows before it is born
example: ...the development of the fetus in the womb.

definitionZh: n  破坏， 毁灭， 摧毁
definitionEn: the act or process of destroying something or of being destroyed
example: {"COLLOINEXA":["weapons of mass destruction"]}

definitionZh: adv  极其， 非常; adj 硬的，僵硬的
definitionEn: extremely bored, frightened, or worried; if someone or a part of their body is stiff, their muscles hurt and it is difficult for them to move
example: As a child, I was scared stiff of going down to the cellar.

definitionZh: vi  繁荣， 兴旺； 成功
definitionEn: if people or businesses prosper, they grow and develop in a successful way, especially by becoming rich or making a large profit
example: Businesses across the state are prospering.

definitionZh: v 打扰，烦扰；烦恼，操心; n  麻烦， 烦扰
definitionEn: to make the effort to do something; trouble or difficulty that has been caused by small problems and that usually only continues for a short time
example: Why bother to go abroad, when there are so many nice places here?

definitionZh: n  更新， 恢复； 重新开始； 重建； 复兴； 续期； 重申
definitionEn: when an activity, situation, or process begins again after a period when it had stopped
example: Mark’s contract comes up for renewal at the end of this year.

definitionZh: vi 呼吁；起诉，上诉；吸引; n  上诉， 申诉； 呼吁； 感染力， 吸引力
definitionEn: to make a serious public request for help, money, information etc; an urgent request for something important
example: She is not happy with the decision and plans to appeal.

definitionZh: adj  心血管的
definitionEn: relating to the heart and  blood vessel s (= tubes through which blood flows around your body )
example: cardiovascular disease

definitionZh: vt 淹没；
definitionEn: to suddenly cover an area with a lot of water
example: Huge waves swamped the vessel.

definitionZh: n  企业家； 承包人
definitionEn: someone who starts a new business or arranges business deals in order to make money, often in a way that involves financial risks
example: How would you define personal growth as an entrepreneur?

definitionZh: n  运输， 运输系统， 运输工具
definitionEn: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
example: The city needs to improve its public transportation (= buses, trains etc ) .

definitionZh: vt  献 ； 题献词
definitionEn: to say at the beginning of a book or film, or before a piece of music, that it has been written, made, or performed for someone that you love or respect
example: She dedicated her first album to Woody Allen, who she says understands her obsession.

definitionZh: v  出现， 显露， 公开露面； 出场， 问世； 仿佛， 似乎
definitionEn: used to say that someone or something seems to have a particular quality or feeling
example: He tried hard to appear calm .

definitionZh: adj  广大的， 广阔的； 广泛的
definitionEn: large in size, amount, or degree
example: The house stands in extensive grounds.

definitionZh: adj  居住的， 住宅的； 寄宿的
definitionEn: a residential part of a town consists of private houses, with no offices or factories
example: a quiet residential neighbourhood

definitionZh: v  刺， 戳
definitionEn: to push a knife into someone or something
example: He was stabbed to death in a fight.

definitionZh: adj  单调的， 无聊的
definitionEn: boring because of always being the same
example: a monotonous diet

definitionZh: vt  鼓舞， 激起； 给…以灵感
definitionEn: to encourage someone by making them feel confident and eager to do something
example: We need someone who can inspire the team.

definitionZh: vt  给予， 赋予； 传授； 告知， 透露
definitionEn: to give a particular quality to something
example: She had information that she couldn’t wait to impart.

definitionZh: n  合作， 协作； 勾结， 通敌
definitionEn: when you work together with another person or group to achieve something, especially in science or art
example: The company is building the centre in collaboration with the Institute of Offshore Engineering.

definitionZh: n  官僚主义； 官僚机构
definitionEn: a complicated official system that is annoying or confusing because it has a lot of rules, processes etc
example: the reduction of unnecessary bureaucracy

definitionZh: vt  使合法； 赋予合法权利
definitionEn: to make something official or legal
example: Acceptance by the UN would effectively legitimize the regime.

definitionZh: n  几何； 几何学
definitionEn: the study in  mathematics  of the angles and shapes formed by the relationships of lines, surfaces, and solid objects in space
example: ...the very ordered way in which mathematics and geometry describe nature.

definitionZh: vi&n  滑行， 滑翔
definitionEn: to move smoothly and quietly, as if without effort
example: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta.

definitionZh: v 使劳累过分；对…使用过度；滥用; n  过重的工作； 工作过度
definitionEn: to work too much or to make someone work too much; too much hard work
example: You’ve been overworking – why don’t you take a week off?

definitionZh: vt  将…奉献给； 致力
definitionEn: to use all or most of your time, effort etc in order to do something or help someone
example: He decided to devote the rest of his life to scientific investigation.

definitionZh: v  投资； 投入； 授予， 赋予
definitionEn: to buy shares, property, or goods because you hope that the value will increase and you can make a profit
example: I’ve got a few thousand dollars I’m looking to invest.

definitionZh: adj 近似的[ə'prɒksɪm3ɪt]; vt  近似
definitionEn: to be close to a particular number
example: For each approximate solution of a parameterized problem, the app also displays the margin of error.

definitionZh: v  放映； 投射， 发射； 突出， 伸出； 设计， 规划; n 计划，方案；课题，项目；工程[prə'dʒekt]
definitionEn: to stick out beyond an edge or surface; a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc
example: projecting teeth

definitionZh: adj  侧面的， 旁边的
definitionEn: relating to the sides of something, or movement to the side
example: The wall is weak and requires lateral support.

definitionZh: n  内地， 腹地， 内陆
definitionEn: an area of land that is far from the coast, large rivers, or the places where people live
example: the rural hinterland

definitionZh: vt  使…凸出； 压花
vt  使陷于危险， 危及
definitionEn: to put something or someone in danger
example: Tax increases now might imperil economic recovery.

definitionZh: n  直径
definitionEn: a straight line from one side of a circle to the other side, passing through the centre of the circle, or the length of this line
example: ...a tube less than a fifth of the diameter of a human hair.

definitionZh: adj  静止的， 不动的， 固定的； 稳定的
definitionEn: standing still instead of moving
example: How did you manage to drive into a stationary vehicle?

definitionZh: vi 吠叫; n  犬吠声； 树皮
definitionEn: when a dog barks, it makes a short loud sound or series of sounds; the outer covering of a tree
example: Don't let the dogs bark.

definitionZh: v  成环， 成圈； 成环形运动; n 圈环；环状物；环路；循环
definitionEn: to move in a circular direction that forms the shape of a loop; a shape like a curve or a circle made by a line curving back towards itself, or a piece of wire, string etc that has this shape
example: The ball looped over the goalkeeper into the back of the net.

definitionZh: adj  赤裸的， 光秃的
definitionEn: not covered by clothes
example: a ragged child with bare feet

definitionZh: adj  可怕的； 难以应付的， 难以克服的
definitionEn: very powerful or impressive, and often frightening
example: The building is grey, formidable, not at all picturesque.

definitionZh: vi  富于； 充满
definitionEn: If things abound, or if a place abounds with things, there are very large numbers of them
example: Stories abound about when he was in charge.

definitionZh: n  手提箱； 衣箱
definitionEn: a large case with a handle, used for carrying clothes and possessions when you travel
example: It did not take Andrew long to pack a suitcase.

definitionZh: vt  倒转， 颠倒
definitionEn: to put something in the opposite position to the one it was in before, especially by turning it upside down (= the bottom is on the top and the top is on the bottom )
example: Invert the cake onto a serving plate.

definitionZh: n 曲柄，曲轴; vt  用曲柄转动某物
definitionEn: a handle on a piece of equipment, that you can turn in order to move something; to make something move by turning a crank
example: He was idly turning a crank on a strange mechanism strapped to his chest.

definitionZh: n  吸盘； 吸根， 根出条
definitionEn: a part of an insect or of an animal’s body that it uses to hold on to a surface

definitionZh: n  征服； 战利品
definitionEn: the act of getting control of a country by fighting
example: the Norman Conquest (= the conquest of England by the Normans )

definitionZh: n  修改， 改正
definitionEn: a small change made in something such as a design, plan, or system
example: They have used the same process for almost 50 years with only minor modifications .

definitionZh: adj  密集的； 浓厚的
definitionEn: made of or containing a lot of things or people that are very close together
example: a dense rurally-based population

definitionZh: n  信心； 保证； 保险
definitionEn: a promise that something will definitely happen or is definitely true, made especially to make someone less worried
example: Despite my repeated assurances, Rob still looked very nervous.

definitionZh: n  两星期， 十四天
definitionEn: two weeks
example: a fortnight’s holiday

definitionZh: vt  使中断； 扰乱
definitionEn: to prevent something from continuing in its usual way by causing problems
example: Traffic was disrupted by a hoax bomb.

definitionZh: n  护目镜； 风镜； 游泳镜
definitionEn: a pair of  glasses  made of glass or plastic with a rubber or plastic edge that fit against your skin and protect your eyes
example: And protect your eyes from snow and ice glare with dark glasses or goggles.

definitionZh: adj  假设的， 假定的； 爱猜想的
definitionEn: based on a situation that is not real, but that might happen
example: The question is purely hypothetical .

definitionZh: vi 谈话，会谈['kɒnvɜːs]; adj 逆向的; n  相反的事物； 反面
definitionEn: to have a conversation with someone; the converse of a fact, word, statement etc is the opposite of it
example: Luke sat directly behind the pilot and conversed with him.

definitionZh: adj 古怪的，反常的; n  古怪的人
definitionEn: behaving in a way that is unusual and different from most people; someone who behaves in a way that is different from what is usual or socially accepted
example: His eccentric behaviour lost him his job.

definitionZh: n  告别； 欢送会
definitionEn: the action of saying goodbye
example: Mourners gathered to bid farewell to the victims of the plane tragedy.

definitionZh: n  用具， 器具
definitionEn: a piece of equipment, especially electrical equipment, such as a  cooker  or  washing machine  , used in people’s homes
example: He could also learn to use the vacuum cleaner, the washing machine and other household appliances.

definitionZh: adj 大量的; v  聚集; n 团，众多；【物】质量；
definitionEn: involving or intended for a very large number of people; to come together, or to make people or things come together, in a large group; the amount of material in something
example: a mass protest

definitionZh: n  [the R-] 文艺复兴， 文艺复兴时期； 复兴， 新生
definitionEn: a new interest in something, especially a particular form of art, music etc, that has not been popular for a long period
example: ...the Renaissance masterpieces in London's galleries.

definitionZh: adj  有毒的， 有害的； 恶毒的， 邪恶的
definitionEn: containing poison or producing poison
example: Some mushrooms are extremely poisonous.

definitionZh: adj  可推断的， 推理的
definitionEn: of, relating to, or derived from inference
example: Finally, people like to stereotype. This is an inferential process based on limited data.

definitionZh: v  做手势; n 姿势，姿态；手势
definitionEn: to move your hand, arm, or head to tell someone something, or show them what you mean; a movement of part of your body, especially your hands or head, to show what you mean or how you feel
example: I gestured toward the boathouse, and he looked inside.

definitionZh: v  承认； 准许…进入； 准许…加入
definitionEn: to agree unwillingly that something is true or that someone else is right
example: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted.

definitionZh: vt  推进， 推动； 驱使
definitionEn: to move, drive, or push something forward
example: a boat propelled by a small motor

definitionZh: adj  猖獗的， 肆虐的， 泛滥的； 蔓生的， 疯长的
definitionEn: if something bad, such as crime or disease, is rampant, there is a lot of it and it is very difficult to control
example: Pickpocketing is rampant in the downtown area.

definitionZh: n 兴趣；利息；利益; vt  使感兴趣
definitionEn: if you have an interest in something or someone, you want to know or learn more about them; to make someone want to pay attention to something and find out more about it
example: I watched the first few episodes, but soon lost interest.

definitionZh: adj  器官的； 有机的； 有机体的； 组织的
definitionEn: living, or produced by or from living things
example: Adding organic matter such as manure can improve the soil.

definitionZh: v  申请； 应用， 使用； 涉及
definitionEn: to make a formal request, usually written, for something such as a job, a place at a university, or permission to do something
example: We need to apply for planning permission to build a garage.

definitionZh: n  行话， 行业术语； 黑话
definitionEn: words and expressions used in a particular profession or by a particular group of people, which are difficult for other people to understand – often used to show disapproval
example: Keep it simple and avoid the use of jargon.

definitionZh: adj  不可信的； 难以置信的
definitionEn: too strange to be believed, or very difficult to believe
example: It’s incredible that he survived the fall.

definitionZh: adj  太空的； 轻巧的
example: ethereal beauty

definitionZh: n  布局， 安排， 设计
definitionEn: the way in which something such as a town, garden, or building is arranged
example: All the flats in the building had the same layout.

definitionZh: v  不同意； 不一致
definitionEn: to have or express a different opinion from someone else
example: Barr strongly disagreed with Kronfeld’s statement.

definitionZh: n&v  雪崩
definitionEn: a large mass of snow, ice, and rocks that falls down the side of a mountain
example: Two skiers were killed in the avalanche.

definitionZh: n  公式； 配方； 准则
definitionEn: a method or set of principles that you use to solve a problem or to make sure that something is successful
example: We’re still searching for a peace formula.

definitionZh: n  贡品； 颂词， 称赞； 礼物
definitionEn: something that you say, do, or give in order to express your respect or admiration for someone
example: The players wore black armbands as a tribute to their late teammate.

definitionZh: vt  危及， 危害
definitionEn: to put someone or something in danger of being hurt, damaged, or destroyed
example: Smoking during pregnancy endangers your baby’s life.

definitionZh: n 茎；干；词干; vt  止住， 抑止， 堵住， 阻止
definitionEn: the long thin part of a plant, from which leaves, flowers, or fruit grow; to stop something from happening, spreading, or developing
example: long-stemmed wine glasses

definitionZh: adj  过分单纯化的， 过分简单化的
definitionEn: treating difficult subjects in a way that is too simple
example: This is a very simplistic approach to the problem.

definitionZh: adj  下级的； 次要的; n 下属; vt  使处于次要地位， 把…列在下级； 使服从
definitionEn: in a less important position than someone else; someone who has a lower position and less authority than someone else in an organization; to put someone or something in a less important position
example: a subordinate officer

definitionZh: vi  伸向； 倾向; n 倾向；趋势；流行，时尚
definitionEn: a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing
example: The current trend is towards more part-time employment.

definitionZh: n&vt  正式要求； 征用
definitionEn: if someone in authority, especially the army, requisitions a building, vehicle, or food, they officially demand to have it during an  emergency  such as a war
example: The building was requisitioned as a military hospital for the duration of the war.

definitionZh: n  成就， 成绩； 达到， 完成， 实现
definitionEn: something important that you succeed in doing by your own efforts
example: His great achievement is to make all the players into a united team.

definitionZh: n  机修工； [-s] 力学， 机械学
definitionEn: someone who is skilled at repairing motor vehicles and machinery
example: a garage mechanic

definitionZh: n  行程表； 旅行路线， 旅行计划
definitionEn: a plan or list of the places you will visit on a journey
example: The next place on our itinerary was Sedona.

definitionZh: n  革命； 巨变， 大变革
definitionEn: a complete change in ways of thinking, methods of working etc
example: the French Revolution of 1789

definitionZh: n  关系， 联系； 亲属， 亲戚
definitionEn: a connection between two or more things
example: The price the meat is sold for bears no relation to (= is not connected to ) the price the farmer receives.

definitionZh: adj  可靠的， 可信赖的
definitionEn: someone or something that is reliable can be trusted or depended on
example: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable

definitionZh: n  刺激； 激励
definitionEn: something that encourages you to work harder, start a new activity etc
example: As an added incentive, there’s a bottle of champagne for the best team.

definitionZh: v  有关联； 讲述， 叙述
definitionEn: if two things relate, they are connected in some way
example: I don’t understand how the two ideas relate.

definitionZh: n  受雇的或现有的工作人员总数； 劳动人口
definitionEn: The workforce is the total number of people in a country or region who are physically able to do a job and are available for work
example: ...a country where half the workforce is unemployed.

definitionZh: adj 开端的，预备的，初步的
definitionEn: happening before something that is more important, often in order to prepare for it
example: the preliminary stages of the competition

definitionZh: n  障碍， 妨碍物， 干扰
definitionEn: something that makes it difficult to achieve some­thing
example: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.

definitionZh: adj  易变的， 无常的
definitionEn: someone who is fickle is always changing their mind about people or things that they like, so that you cannot depend on them – used to show disapproval
example: an unpredictable and fickle lover

definitionZh: n  运货车
definitionEn: a vehicle used especially for carrying goods, which is smaller than a truck and has a roof and usually no windows at the sides
example: a delivery van

definitionZh: n  虫， 蠕虫； 蜗杆， 螺纹
definitionEn: a long thin creature with no bones and no legs that lives in soil
example: ...a new computer worm that disables security software.

definitionZh: adj  头晕目眩的， 眩晕的； 人头晕的
definitionEn: feeling unable to stand steadily, for example because you are looking down from a high place or because you are ill
example: The heat and the champagne made him feel dizzy .

definitionZh: adj  例外的； 异常的
definitionEn: unusually good
example: an exceptional student

definitionZh: v  组成； 构成； 设立， 成立
definitionEn: if several people or things constitute something, they are the parts that form it
example: We must redefine what constitutes a family.

definitionZh: n  合法性； 正统性
example: He continues to cite the article as evidence of his legitimacy.

definitionZh: v 交配，配种; n  配偶； 伙伴； 大副
definitionEn: if animals mate, they have sex to produce babies; the sexual partner of an animal
example: Rabbits can be mated as early as six months old.

definitionZh: vt  确信； 说服
definitionEn: to make someone feel certain that something is true
example: Her arguments didn’t convince everyone, but changes were made.

definitionZh: v 狼吞虎咽，
definitionEn: If you gorge on something or gorge yourself on it, you eat lots of it in a very greedy way
example: I could spend each day gorging on chocolate.

definitionZh: n  登记， 注册； 挂号； 登记或注册的项目
definitionEn: the act of recording names and details on an official list
example: Student registration (= for a course of study ) starts the first week in September.

definitionZh: n  理论， 原理； 学说； 意见， 看法
definitionEn: an idea or set of ideas that is intended to explain something about life or the world, especially an idea that has not yet been proved to be true
example: Freudian theory has had a great influence on psychology.

definitionZh: adj 欧洲大陆的；大陆性的; n  欧洲大陆人
definitionEn: relating to a large mass of land
example: the warming-up of continental interiors

definitionZh: adj  内部的； 国内的
definitionEn: within a particular country
example: We have no interest in interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.

definitionZh: n  伸展； 延长部分； 电话分机
definitionEn: the process of making a road, building etc bigger or longer, or the part that is added
example: a loft extension

definitionZh: n  性别； 性
definitionEn: the fact of being male or female
example: people of the same gender

definitionZh: n  签名， 签字； 签署
definitionEn: your name written in the way you usually write it, for example at the end of a letter, or on a cheque etc, to show that you have written it
example: Her signature is totally illegible (= cannot be read ) .

definitionZh: n  建筑师， 设计师； 创造者
definitionEn: someone whose job is to design buildings
example: Tinoco was one of the architects of the government’s economic reforms.

definitionZh: v 〔因紧张或惊慌而〕反胃; n 〔制造黄油的〕搅乳器
definitionEn: if your stomach churns, you feel sick because you are nervous or frightened; a container used for shaking milk in order to make it into butter
example: My stomach was churning on the day of the exam.

definitionZh: n  基础； 地基； 创立
definitionEn: the solid layer of  cement  , bricks, stones etc that is put under a building to support it
example: It took the builders three weeks to lay the foundations .

definitionZh: n  占星学； 占星术
definitionEn: the study of the positions and movements of the stars and how they might influence people and events
example: Why do people believe in astrology?

definitionZh: n  可变性， 易变性
example: In our world, not only do we have variability, we've got unpredictability.

definitionZh: n  入侵者
definitionEn: a soldier or a group of soldiers that enters a country or town by force in order to take control of it
example: Invaders ransacked the town.

definitionZh: v 穿孔，打孔；重击，猛击; n  猛击； 冲床， 穿孔机； 力量， 效力
definitionEn: to hit someone or something hard with your  fist (= closed hand ) ; a strong effective way of expressing things that makes people interested
example: He punched me and knocked my teeth out.

definitionZh: adv  当然， 自然； 天生地
definitionEn: use this to say that something is normal and not surprising
example: Naturally, you’ll want to discuss this with your wife.

definitionZh: n  柔韧， 有弹性； 柔顺， 温顺； 灵活性； 适应性
definitionEn: the ability to change or be changed easily to suit a different situation
example: Employees expect flexibility in the workplace.

definitionZh: n  身份； 特性； 同一性
definitionEn: someone’s identity is their name or who they are
example: The identity of the killer is still unknown.

definitionZh: adj  联邦的， 联盟的
definitionEn: a federal country or system of government consists of a group of states which control their own affairs, but which are also controlled by a single national government which makes decisions on foreign affairs, defence etc
example: Switzerland is a federal republic.

definitionZh: vt  证明； 证实
definitionEn: to state that something is true
example: His statement was verified by several witnesses.

definitionZh: n  远足， 短途旅游； 【物】 偏移， 漂移
definitionEn: a short journey arranged so that a group of people can visit a place, especially while they are on holiday
example: a shopping excursion

definitionZh: adj  势利的， 谄上欺下的； 自命不凡的
definitionEn: behaving in a way that shows you think you are better than other people because you are from a higher social class or know more than they do
example: Her family seems snobbish.

definitionZh: vt  开始， 开创； 为…举行就职典礼； 为…举行开幕式； 为…举行落成仪式
definitionEn: to hold an official ceremony when someone starts doing an important job in government
example: The Turner Prize was inaugurated in 1984.

definitionZh: n 奖赏；报酬; vt  酬谢； 奖励
definitionEn: something that you get because you have done something good or helpful or have worked hard; to give something to someone because they have done something good or helpful or have worked for it
example: The school has a system of rewards and punishments to encourage good behaviour.

definitionZh: v  包括， 包含； 计入
definitionEn: if one thing includes another, the second thing is part of the first
example: Does the price include postage?

definitionZh: n  曲棍球； 冰球
definitionEn: a game played on grass by two teams of 11 players, with sticks and a ball
example: ...a new hockey arena.

definitionZh: v 吞咽；忍受; n  燕子
definitionEn: to make food or drink go down your throat and towards your stomach; a small black and white bird that comes to northern countries in the summer
example: He swallowed the last of his coffee and asked for the bill.

definitionZh: n  利益； 特权
example: In so many countries that I covered in Southeast Asia it was a given that the elites would take over public land as a kind of perquisite of power.

definitionZh: n  定量； 限额
n  合并； 巩固
definitionEn: the act of consolidating or state of being consolidated
example: The consolidation of the beautifier of life, the society.

definitionZh: vt 培养；滋养; n  营养品
definitionEn: to help a plan, idea, feeling etc to develop
example: European union is an ideal that has been nurtured since the post-war years.

definitionZh: adj  破坏的
definitionEn: causing damage to people or things
example: the destructive power of modern weapons

definitionZh: adj  适宜耕种的， 可耕种的
vi 退化[dɪ'dʒ3nərət]; adj  退化的
definitionEn: to become worse; morally unacceptable
example: Inactivity can make your joints stiff, and the bones may begin to degenerate.

definitionZh: v  扣紧； 变形； 弯曲; n 皮带扣环
definitionEn: to become bent or curved because of heat or pressure, or to make something bend or curve in this way; a piece of metal used for fastening the two ends of a belt, for fastening a shoe, bag etc, or for decoration
example: The steel pillars began to buckle.

definitionZh: adj  草率的， 匆忙的
definitionEn: done in a hurry, especially with bad results
example: He soon regretted his hasty decision.

definitionZh: vt 审查，检查; n  检查员
definitionEn: to examine books, films, letters etc to remove anything that is considered offensive, morally harmful, or politically dangerous etc; someone whose job is to examine books, films, letters etc and remove anything considered to be offensive, morally harmful, or politically dangerous
example: The information given to the press was carefully censored by the Ministry of Defence.

definitionZh: v&n  搅动； 摇动； 激动
definitionEn: If you stir a liquid or other substance, you move it around or mix it in a container using something such as a spoon
example: Stir the soup for a few seconds.

definitionZh: n  工艺， 手艺； 船； 航空器
definitionEn: a job or activity in which you make things with your hands, and that you usually need skill to do
example: traditional rural crafts

definitionZh: n  存在； 生活
definitionEn: the state of existing
example: Scientists have many theories about how the universe first came into existence (= started to exist ).

definitionZh: adj  迁徙的， 移居的； 流动的， 游牧的
definitionEn: involved in or relating to migration
example: migratory birds

definitionZh: n  入门， 门槛； 界限； 开端， 起点
definitionEn: the entrance to a room or building, or the area of floor or ground at the entrance
example: She opened the door and stepped across the threshold.

definitionZh: vt  打开， 解开； 除去包装
definitionEn: to remove the paper, plastic etc that is around something
example: Brigitte was unwrapping her birthday presents.

definitionZh: adj  处于被告地位的； 为自己辩护的; n 被告
definitionEn: the person in a court of law who has been  accused  of doing something illegal
example: We find the defendant not guilty.

definitionZh: adj  粗的； 粗糙的； 粗劣的
definitionEn: having a rough surface that feels slightly hard
example: a jacket of coarse wool

definitionZh: n  小巷； 胡同
definitionEn: a narrow street between or behind buildings, not usually used by cars
example: The alley led to the railway bridge.

definitionZh: v  夸大， 夸张
definitionEn: to make something seem better, larger, worse etc than it really is
example: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.

definitionZh: vt  发现， 找到； 发觉
definitionEn: to find someone or something, either by accident or because you were looking for them
example: The body was discovered in a field.

definitionZh: vt 审查，仔细检查; n  兽医
definitionEn: to check someone’s past activities, relationships etc in order to make sure that person is suitable for a particular job, especially an important one; someone who is trained to give medical care and treatment to sick animals
example: All candidates are carefully vetted by Central Office.

definitionZh: vt  抵消， 补偿， 弥补
definitionEn: if the cost or amount of something offsets another cost or amount, the two things have an opposite effect so that the situation remains the same
example: Cuts in food prices will be offset by direct payments to farmers.

definitionZh: n  小瀑布
definitionEn: a small steep  waterfall  that is one of several together
example: Failure can cause a system imbalance, resulting in a pressure cascade malfunction with a resultant airflow reversal.

definitionZh: vt 捕获，俘获；夺取或赢得; n  捕获； 战利品
definitionEn: to catch a person and keep them as a prisoner; when you catch someone in order to make them a prisoner
example: Government troops have succeeded in capturing the rebel leader.

definitionZh: adj  有读写能力的； 有文化的； 博学的
definitionEn: able to read and write
example: Over one-quarter of the adult population are not fully literate.

definitionZh: n  资格， 合格； 技能； 限定， 条件； 合格证
definitionEn: if you have a qualification, you have passed an examination or course to show you have a particular level of skill or knowledge in a subject
example: He left school without any qualifications.

definitionZh: n  一系列， 一连串； 顺序， 次序
definitionEn: the order that something happens or exists in, or the order it is supposed to happen or exist in
example: Be careful to perform the actions in the correct sequence .

definitionZh: n  燃烧； 燃烧过程
definitionEn: the process of burning
example: The energy is released by combustion on the application of a match.

definitionZh: n  供应， 供应品； 准备， 预备； 条款， 规定； 给养， 口粮
definitionEn: when you provide something that someone needs now or in the future
example: He made provisions for his wife and his children in his will.

definitionZh: v 招募，招收；复原，恢复；补充; n  新兵， 新成员， 新会员
definitionEn: to find new people to work in a company, join an organization, do a job etc; someone who has just joined the army, navy, or  air force
example: We’re having difficulty recruiting enough qualified staff.

definitionZh: v  开始， 着手
definitionEn: to begin or to start something
example: Work will commence on the new building immediately.

definitionZh: n  结构， 配置； 轮廓， 外形
definitionEn: the combination of equipment needed to run a computer system
example: Prices range from $119 to $199, depending on the particular configuration.

definitionZh: n  大块； 相当大的部分
definitionEn: a large thick piece of something that does not have an even shape
example: ice chunks

definitionZh: n  平台， 站台； 纲领
definitionEn: the raised place beside a railway track where you get on and off a train in a station
example: The Edinburgh train will depart from platform six.

definitionZh: n 诽谤，中伤；诽谤性文字; vt  诽谤， 中伤， 诬蔑
definitionEn: when someone writes or prints untrue statements about someone so that other people could have a bad opinion of them; to write or print a libel against someone
example: restrictions on press freedom, such as libel laws

definitionZh: n  出处， 起源
definitionEn: the place where something originally came from
example: The provenance of the paintings is unknown.

definitionZh: adj  灭绝的； 废弃的
definitionEn: an extinct type of animal or plant does not exist any more
example: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.

definitionZh: n  车轴， 轮轴
definitionEn: the bar connecting two wheels on a car or other vehicle
example: Remove the upper suspension arm nut and bolt at the axle bracket.

definitionZh: v  降级； 堕落； 降解； 退化
definitionEn: if a substance, chemical etc degrades, or if something degrades it, it changes to a simpler form

definitionZh: n  生物多样性
definitionEn: the variety of plants and animals in a particular place
example: the biodiversity of the rainforest

definitionZh: adj  不透明的； 晦涩的， 难懂的
definitionEn: opaque glass or liquid is difficult to see through and often thick
example: a shower with an opaque glass door

definitionZh: n  优点， 优势
definitionEn: something that helps you to be more successful than others, or the state of having this
example: Younger workers tend to be at an advantage (=  have an advantage  ) when applying for jobs.

definitionZh: adj 助理的；
definitionEn: someone whose job is just below the level of manager etc
example: Whose assistant should I work as?

definitionZh: vt 对…估计过高[ˌəuvər'estImət]; n  过高的估计
definitionEn: to think something is better, more important etc than it really is; a calculation, judgement, or guess that is too large
example: He tends to overestimate his own abilities.

definitionZh: adj  湿的， 潮湿的， 湿润的， 多潮气的
definitionEn: if the weather is humid, you feel uncomfortable because the air is very wet and usually hot
example: Tokyo is extremely humid in mid-summer.

definitionZh: n  争论， 辩论， 论战
definitionEn: a serious argument about something that involves many people and continues for a long time
example: a political controversy

definitionZh: adj  义务的； 必须做的； 强制性的； 必修的
definitionEn: something that is compulsory must be done because it is the law or because someone in authority orders you to
example: the threat of compulsory redundancies

definitionZh: v  预期， 预料， 期望； 先于…行动
definitionEn: to expect that something will happen and be ready for it
example: Sales are better than anticipated.

definitionZh: v  分开， 分离； 分遣
definitionEn: If you detach one thing from another that it is attached to, you remove it. If one thing detaches from another, it becomes separated from it.
example: Detach the white part of the application form and keep it for reference only.

definitionZh: v  砍； 大幅度削减; n 砍痕，伤痕；斜线号
definitionEn: to cut or try to cut something violently with a knife, sword etc; a line (/) used in writing to separate words, numbers, or letters
example: Someone had slashed the tires.

definitionZh: vt  勾引， 引诱； 诱使， 唆使
definitionEn: to persuade someone to have sex with you, especially in a way that is attractive and not too direct
example: The head lecturer was sacked for seducing female students.

definitionZh: n 风景; vt  对…作景观美化， 美化
definitionEn: an area of countryside or land of a particular type, used especially when talking about its appearance; to make a park, garden etc look attractive and interesting by changing its design, and by planting trees and bushes etc
example: the beauty of the New England landscape

definitionZh: adj  临时的， 暂时的
definitionEn: continuing for only a limited period of time
example: temporary pain relief

definitionZh: n  栖息地， 住处
definitionEn: the natural home of a plant or animal
example: watching monkeys in their natural habitat

definitionZh: adj  绝望的； 拼命的， 不顾一切的； 极度渴望的； 危急的
definitionEn: willing to do anything to change a very bad situation, and not caring about danger
example: I had no money left and was desperate.

definitionZh: adj  糟糕的
definitionEn: very bad or unpleasant
example: The weather was awful.

definitionZh: adj  方便的； 手边的； 手巧的
definitionEn: near and easy to reach
example: I always keep my gun handy just in case.

definitionZh: n  树枝； 分部， 分科
definitionEn: a part of a tree that grows out from the  trunk (=  main stem  )  and that has leaves, fruit, or smaller branches growing from it
example: After the storm, the ground was littered with twigs and branches.

definitionZh: v  敦促， 力劝； 鼓励； 竭力主张
definitionEn: to strongly suggest that someone does something
example: The charity urged quick action.

definitionZh: n  顾问， 辅导顾问
definitionEn: someone whose job is to help and support people with problems
example: Are you seeing a counsellor?

definitionZh: n  高科技
example: Comparing former films and modern high-tech films, which kind do you like better and why?

definitionZh: n  四周有篱笆的场地， 围场； 附件
definitionEn: an area surrounded by a wall or fence, and used for a particular purpose
example: the bear enclosure at the zoo

definitionZh: adj  视觉的， 用于视觉的
definitionEn: relating to seeing
example: Artists translate their ideas into visual images.

definitionZh: adj  不在场的； 心不在焉的
definitionEn: not at work, school, a meeting etc, because you are sick or decide not to go
example: The dull, absent look on her face implied boredom.

definitionZh: n  帝国
definitionEn: a group of countries that are all controlled by one ruler or government
example: the Roman empire

definitionZh: adj  体谅的； 宽容的; n 理解；谅解
definitionEn: sympathetic and kind about other people’s problems; the ability to understand people’s behaviour and to forgive them when they do something wrong
example: Luckily, I have a very under­standing boss.

definitionZh: vt  利用， 运用
example: The one thing that never crosses the minds of our elite is to utilise local talent, local enterprise, local money to build Pakistan.

definitionZh: n  圣堂， 圣殿， 圣坛； 圣地； 庇护所， 避难所； 禁猎区， 动物保护区
definitionEn: an area for birds or animals where they are protected and cannot be hunted
example: His church became a sanctuary for thousands of people who fled the civil war.

definitionZh: n  有氧运动
definitionEn: a very active type of physical exercise done to music, usually in a class
example: Yoga has become the new aerobics and some people are getting it out of a book or video.

definitionZh: vt  教导； 指示， 命令
definitionEn: to officially tell someone what to do
example: Eva went straight to the hotel, as instructed (= as she had been told ).

definitionZh: n 向上的斜坡；增加，改善; vt  使升级， 提高， 改进； 提拔， 提升； 改善
definitionEn: to make a computer, machine, or piece of software better and able to do more things
example: The hotel has recently been refurbished and upgraded.

definitionZh: adj  有偏见的； 片面的
definitionEn: unfairly preferring one person or group over another
example: Of course I’m biased, but I thought my daughter’s paintings were the best.

definitionZh: n  社会； 社区； 团体； 群落； 共同体
definitionEn: the people who live in the same area, town etc
example: The new arts centre will serve the whole community.

definitionZh: n  疾病
definitionEn: an illness that is not very serious
example: minor ailments

definitionZh: n  样式； 型号； 种类； 说法； 版本； 译本
definitionEn: a copy of something that has been changed so that it is slightly different
example: the human version of mad cow disease

definitionZh: n  喷射剂； 推进物， 推进剂
definitionEn: Propellant is a substance that causes something to move forward
example: ...a propellant for nuclear rockets.

definitionZh: adj 被抛弃的；衰退的，破败的; n  遗弃物； 无家可归者， 社会弃儿
definitionEn: a derelict building or piece of land is in very bad condition because it has not been used for a long time; someone who has no money or home, lives on the streets, and is very dirty – used to show disapproval
example: Her body was found dumped in a derelict warehouse less than a mile from her home.

definitionZh: n  观念， 概念
definitionEn: an idea about what something is like, or a general understanding of something
example: My conception of a garden was based on gardens I had visited in England.

definitionZh: n  青春， 青春期
definitionEn: the time, usually between the ages of 12 and 18, when a young person is developing into an adult
example: Some young people suddenly become self-conscious and tongue-tied in early adolescence.

definitionZh: n 细节，详情；枝节，琐事; vt  详述， 详细说明
definitionEn: a single feature, fact, or piece of information about something; to list things or give all the facts or information about something
example: This issue will be discussed in more detail in Chapter 5.

definitionZh: v  呼出； 散发
definitionEn: to breathe air, smoke etc out of your mouth
example: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly.

definitionZh: adj 适当的[ə'prəuprieɪt]; vt  占有， 挪用； 拨出
definitionEn: correct or suitable for a particular time, situation, or purpose; to take something for yourself when you do not have the right to do this
example: The timing of the announcement was particularly appropriate .

definitionZh: v  谨防， 当心
definitionEn: used to warn someone to be careful because something is dangerous
example: Police warned drivers to beware.

definitionZh: n 功用，效用；
definitionEn: a piece of computer software that has a particular use
example: It’s a simple shareware utility that allows you to print signs and banners.

definitionZh: adv  立即， 马上； 紧接地； 直接地
definitionEn: without delay
example: Mix in the remaining ingredients and serve immediately.

definitionZh: n  交响乐
definitionEn: a long piece of music usually in four parts, written for an  orchestra
example: Bruckner’s Fifth Symphony

definitionZh: adj  乐观的， 乐观主义的
definitionEn: believing that good things will happen in the future
example: Andrew took a more optimistic view.

definitionZh: adj  水底的， 海底的; n 潜水艇
definitionEn: growing or used under the sea; a ship, especially a military one, that can stay under water
example: submarine plant life

definitionZh: adj 光滑而有光泽的；时髦的；豪华的; vt  使光滑发亮

example: the sleek lines of the new Mercedes

definitionZh: adj  悲惨的； 灾难性的
definitionEn: Something that is catastrophic involves or causes a sudden terrible disaster
example: A tidal wave caused by the earthquake hit the coast causing catastrophic damage.

definitionZh: n  极少量； 微粒
definitionEn: a very small piece of something
example: dust particles

definitionZh: v  下来， 下降； 遗传
definitionEn: to move from a higher level to a lower one
example: Our plane started to descend.

definitionZh: n 风味，滋味; vt  给…调味
definitionEn: the particular taste of a food or drink; to give something a particular taste or more taste
example: Which flavour do you want - chocolate or vanilla?

definitionZh: n  密集； 浓度， 密度
definitionEn: the degree to which an area is filled with people or things
example: areas of high population density

definitionZh: adj  荒谬的； 可笑的
definitionEn: very silly or unreasonable
example: That’s a ridiculous idea!

definitionZh: n  闯入； 打搅； 侵扰
definitionEn: when someone does something, or something happens, that affects your private life or activities in an unwanted way
example: the unwelcome intrusion of the press

definitionZh: adj  严重的； 严厉的； 剧烈的
definitionEn: severe problems, injuries, illnesses etc are very bad or very serious
example: His injuries were quite severe.

definitionZh: n  路径， 途径
definitionEn: A pathway is a path that you can walk along or a route that you can take
example: Richard was coming up the pathway.

definitionZh: n 板条，狭板; vt  用板条制作
definitionEn: a thin flat piece of wood, plastic etc, used especially in furniture; to provide with slats
example: Oak clads the front walls, while slat covers a wall at the rear.

definitionZh: vi  出现； 显露， 暴露
definitionEn: to appear or come out from somewhere
example: The flowers emerge in the spring.

definitionZh: vt  作为…的典型； 例证， 举例说明
definitionEn: to be a very typical example of something
example: The building exemplifies the style of architecture which was popular at the time.

definitionZh: n 租约; vt  出租， 租用
definitionEn: a legal agreement which allows you to use a building, car etc for a period of time, in return for rent; to use a building, car etc under a lease
example: The landlord refused to renew his lease.

definitionZh: vt  剥削； 开发， 开拓； 利用; n  英勇行为； 业绩， 功绩

example: Homeworkers can easily be exploited by employers.

definitionZh: n  根据， 证据； 形迹， 迹象

definitionZh: adj  致命的， 破坏性的， 毁灭性的； 有害的

definitionZh: v  跳跃； 涌现， 突然出现； 突然提出; n 春天，春季；弹簧，发条；弹性，弹力；泉；跳跃
definitionEn: to suddenly become active, start moving, or start working; the season between winter and summer when leaves and flowers appear
example: They were prepared and ready to spring into action.

definitionZh: n  判定， 评定； 核定的付款额； 看法， 评价

definitionZh: n  自治， 自治权； 人身自由， 自主权

definitionZh: n  健康； 适合

definitionZh: adj 女的；

example: female voters

definitionZh: adj 催眠的; n  催眠药

example: His voice had a smooth hypnotic effect .

definitionZh: n  部长； 外交使节； 牧师
definitionEn: a politician who is in charge of a government depart-ment, in Britain and some other countries
example: a senior Cabinet minister

definitionZh: adj  残忍的， 残暴的
definitionEn: making someone suffer or feel unhappy
example: His death was a cruel blow .

definitionZh: n 阴凉处；罩；暗部；色度；细微差别; vt  遮蔽， 遮光； 把…涂暗
definitionEn: slight darkness or shelter from the direct light of the sun made by something blocking it; to protect something from direct light
example: a plant that needs a lot of shade

definitionZh: v  聚集， 集合， 聚拢； 收集， 采集； 逐渐增加； 猜想， 推测
definitionEn: to come together and form a group, or to make people do this
example: A crowd gathered to watch the fight.

definitionZh: v  坚持， 坚决认为； 一定要

example: Stay for supper – I insist!

definitionZh: n  卷， 册； 体积； 音量

example: the volume of trade

definitionZh: vt  集中体现； 概括
n 指导方针，指导原则
definitionEn: rules or instructions about the best way to do something
example: This chapter gives you some guidelines to help you in your work.

definitionZh: adj  亚热带的
definitionEn: related to or typical of an area that is near a tropical area
example: subtropical vegetation

definitionZh: adj  松的； 散漫的； 不精确的
definitionEn: not firmly fastened in place
example: a loose floorboard

definitionZh: n  喷出； 排出物
example: The amount or rate of emission or ejection.

definitionZh: n  火石， 打火石
definitionEn: a type of smooth hard stone that makes a small flame when you hit it with steel
example: ...a flint arrowhead.

definitionZh: n  排成直线； 联盟

example: The church should have no political alignment.

definitionZh: adj  多刺的； 痛苦的， 棘手的
definitionEn: a question etc that is complicated and difficult
example: the thorny question of immigration policy

definitionZh: adj  开发的， 利用的； 剥削的
definitionEn: taking as much as possible from someone or something and giving very little in return
example: the exploitative nature of multinational companies

definitionZh: adj  私人的； 私下的； 私立的
definitionEn: for use by one person or group, not for everyone
example: Morris has a private jet.

definitionZh: adj  技术的， 工艺的
definitionEn: connected with knowledge of how machines work
example: Our staff will be available to give you technical support .

definitionZh: n  共事者； 同伴
definitionEn: someone you spend a lot of time with, especially a friend
example: For ten years he had been her constant companion .

definitionZh: vi  告终； 结束

definitionZh: n  垮台， 倒塌， 破裂； 衰竭， 衰弱； 损坏， 故障； 分类

definitionZh: n  不一致； 不和谐
definitionEn: disagreement about important things which makes people be unfriendly to each other

definitionZh: v 伸展；延伸，延续，拉长；使倾注全力，使紧张; n  一段； 伸展， 延伸， 延续

example: Carl sat up in bed, yawned, and stretched.

definitionZh: vt  达到， 完成， 实现

example: We have accomplished all we set out to do.

definitionZh: n  股， 缕； 部分， 方面

example: She tried to blow a grey strand of hair from her eyes.

definitionZh: adj  组成的； 有宪法制定或修改权的; n 成分，要素；选区内的选民

definitionZh: vt  使烦躁； 使疼痛； 刺激

definitionZh: adj  有责任感的； 可靠的
definitionEn: if someone is responsible for an accident, mistake, crime etc, it is their fault or they can be blamed
example: We are determined to bring the people responsible to justice.

definitionZh: n  亚麻织品； 亚麻布
definitionEn: cloth made from the flax plant, used to make high quality clothes, home decorations etc
example: a linen jacket

definitionZh: n  枪弹， 子弹
definitionEn: a small piece of metal that you fire from a gun
example: He was killed by a single bullet.

definitionZh: vt  照亮； 阐明， 解释； 启发
definitionEn: to make a light shine on something, or to fill a place with light
example: A single candle illuminated his face.

definitionZh: v  结束引语
v  伸出； 突出

example: ...a huge round mass of smooth rock protruding from the water.

definitionZh: adj  滑的， 滑溜的； 油滑的， 狡猾的； 棘手的
definitionEn: something that is slippery is difficult to hold, walk on etc because it is wet or  greasy

definitionZh: n  重要性， 意义
definitionEn: The significance of something is the importance that it has, usually because it will have an effect on a situation or shows something about a situation
example: Ideas about the social significance of religion have changed over time.

definitionZh: n  论坛； 讨论会
definitionEn: an organization, meeting, TV programme etc where people have a chance to publicly discuss an important subject
example: Members of the council agreed that was an important forum for discussion.

definitionZh: n  轻视， 鄙视， 不尊重； 蔑视
definitionEn: a feeling that someone or something is not important and deserves no respect
example: The public is treated with contempt by broadcasters.

definitionZh: n  地平线； 范围； 眼界
definitionEn: the line far away where the land or sea seems to meet the sky

definitionZh: n  周围状况； 环境
definitionEn: the air, water, and land on Earth, which is affected by man’s activities
example: Some of these chemicals are very damaging to the environment.

definitionZh: vt  出卖， 泄露； 辜负； 流露情感
definitionEn: to show feelings that you are trying to hide
example: His voice betrayed his nervousness.

definitionZh: n  免费电话
definitionEn: A Freefone telephone number is one which you can dial without having to pay for the call

definitionZh: adj 故意的；深思熟虑的；从容不迫的[dɪ'lIbəreIt]; v  深思熟虑； 审议
definitionEn: intended or planned
example: a deliberate attempt to humiliate her

definitionZh: v  宣； 诅咒
definitionEn: to use rude and offensive language
example: Don’t swear in front of the children.

definitionZh: n  轴， 柄， 杆； 矛柄， 把柄； 束， 光线； 竖井， 升降井
definitionEn: a passage which goes down through a building or down into the ground, so that someone or something can get in or out
example: a drive shaft

definitionZh: n  大气； 气氛； 环境
definitionEn: the feeling that an event or place gives you
example: The hotel had a lovely relaxed atmosphere .

definitionZh: v  装饰， 装潢， 布置； 授勋
definitionEn: to paint the inside of a room, put special paper on the walls etc
example: The bathroom is decorated in green and yellow.

definitionZh: n  生涯； 经历； 职业

example: a teaching career

definitionZh: n  占领； 职业； 消遣
definitionEn: a job or profession
example: Please state your name, address and occupation.

definitionZh: v  松弛， 放松； 放慢； 萧条
definitionEn: to gradually become slower, weaker, less active etc, or to make something do this
example: The heavy rain showed no signs of slackening off.

definitionZh: vt  记住， 熟记
example: This involved being shown a picture of eight animals and being asked to memorise the order in which the creatures appeared.

definitionZh: vt 释放，解放；发表，发行; n  释放； 发表， 发布； 排放， 泄露
definitionEn: to let someone go free, after having kept them somewhere; when someone is officially allowed to go free, after being kept somewhere
example: Police arrested several men, who were later released.

definitionZh: n 纲领，宣言；宪章；包租; vt  包租； 特许设立， 给…发许可证， 给予特权
definitionEn: a statement of the principles, duties, and purposes of an organization; to pay a company for the use of their aircraft, boat etc
example: the freedoms embodied in the UN charter

definitionZh: vi  变苗条; adj 苗条的；薄的
definitionEn: someone who is slim is attractively thin
example: How do you keep so slim?

definitionZh: vt  使洁净， 使纯洁， 净化； 提纯， 精炼
definitionEn: to remove dirty or harmful substances from something
example: chemicals used to purify the water

definitionZh: adj 道德的，伦理的
definitionEn: relating to the principles of what is right and wrong behaviour, and with the difference between good and evil
example: It is easy to have an opinion on a moral issue like the death penalty for murder.

definitionZh: adj  精神病的； 治疗精神病的
definitionEn: relating to the study and treatment of mental illness
example: a psychiatric hospital
